كسوة المعدن بماء الذهب أو الفضة
كثرة ماء القلب على جهة البلادة
تعرض للمطر أو انكشاف لما يهجم

records.primary_reading: Ordinary rainwater descends from the sky and is the means by which fruits are brought out as provision.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window sets this ordered, beneficial descent between the disorienting storm of 2:20 and the fire of 2:24; the repeated descent verb in نَزَّلْنَا for revelation (2:23) also makes material provision and the revealed challenge parallel gifts calling for recognition rather than rivals.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 presents the water as water made to appear abundantly from the sky; root_001458/B003 presents it as deliberately supplied water whose destination is human provision.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ is the visible pouring-from-sky construction and فَأَخْرَجَ ... ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ shows its abundance becoming manifest in produce; the bridge is from descent to productive appearance, so مَآءً contributes a staged emergence of provision. For root_001458/B003, رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ supplies the beneficiary and فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِ supplies the directed result; the bridge is purposeful delivery, so the water reads not only as rain but as provision actively conveyed through rain.
records.negative_evidence: The mention of fruits does not by itself activate root_001458/B006 because no ripening, sheen, or sweetness cue appears. Nothing locally supports reproductive fluid, plating, crystal, or heart-dullness branches.

records.primary_reading: Literal water comes out of some stones when they split, one of three stone responses used to expose the greater hardness of the addressed hearts.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding revival of the dead and the following concealment and distortion of understood speech turn the stone comparison into a test of responsiveness: inert matter can open, release, and descend, while informed human hearts resist.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 is activated as water appearing from within split ground or stone. In a contrastive, not literal, role, root_001458/B008 is also activated as the idiom of heart-water associated with dullness.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, يَشَّقَّقُ فَيَخْرُجُ مِنْهُ ٱلْمَآءُ explicitly sequences splitting and water's appearance, reinforced by rivers bursting out; the water therefore marks hidden responsiveness becoming visible. For root_001458/B008, قُلُوبُكُم names the heart, while تَعْقِلُونَ in 2:73 and 2:76 and عَقَلُوهُ in 2:75 frame a failure of understanding; juxtaposing those cues with water-bearing stone supplies the abductive bridge, so the target water becomes a counter-image to dull “heart-water”: the stone's water issues in response, whereas the hard heart's cognition does not.
records.negative_evidence: يُحَرِّفُونَهُ in 2:75 concerns distortion, but without a coating, metallic sheen, or display construction it does not meet the higher burden for root_001458/B005. No watering act, reproductive setting, ripening image, or crystal cue appears.

retained_branches.image_ar: كثرة ماء القلب على جهة البلادة

records.primary_reading: The sea is the broad body of water through which ships travel carrying what benefits people.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Sea travel is one link in a tightly governed creation-wide sequence, while 2:165–166 contrasts that governance with misplaced attachments whose connecting means are finally cut.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The cosmic catalogue and مِن كُلِّ دَآبَّةٍ amplify the scale of the ayah, but they do not provide a sufficiently word-local trigger for root_000086/B002 beyond the sea's already primary breadth. تَقَطَّعَتْ in 2:166 is too remote from the sea word to activate the specialized wide-cleft branch root_000086/B003.
records.negative_evidence: There is no local salt, exposed meeting, water-holding hollow, red depth, bewilderment, sea-relation form, chance encounter, wasting disease, medical crisis, large belly, or unquenched-thirst cue.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater sent down from the sky revives dead earth and enables animal life to spread upon it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The water is not an isolated marvel: it joins ship movement, alternating time, winds, clouds, life, and rational recognition in one governed system, against the rival loyalties exposed in the following ayat.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 activates water's appearing through sky-pouring; root_001458/B003 activates purposeful supply.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, أَنزَلَ ... مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ and the suspended cloud make sky-to-earth appearance explicit, while revival and the spread of every creature register its abundance; the target gains the force of water entering a dead environment and becoming visibly productive. For root_001458/B003, أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ and فَأَحْيَا بِهِ identify a supplier, instrument, and intended beneficiary-world; the bridge is directed life-supply, making the water an administered means within the larger order.
records.negative_evidence: Life and creatures alone do not supply the womb/deposition cues required for root_001458/B004. No fruit-ripening, plating, clarity, or heart-dullness trigger appears.

records.primary_reading: Ordinary water is the normally sought material for ritual washing; when it cannot be found, clean earth and wiping provide the stated alternative.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window surrounds bodily preparation with truthful testimony, non-concealment, awareness of one's speech, and warnings about misguiding the path. Purity before prayer is thus situated inside accountable cognition and speech, not reduced to material washing.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: تَغْتَسِلُوا۟ and the fallback مَسْح action clarify the primary ritual function. They do not show the watering, pouring into, or provisioning construction specific enough to retain root_001458/B003; the target itself occurs precisely under non-availability, فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا۟.
records.negative_evidence: مَا تَقُولُونَ and حَدِيثًا do not describe sweet speech for root_001458/B006, and concealment or misguidance does not supply the coating/display image of root_001458/B005. No reproductive, abundance, crystal, or heart-water cue qualifies.

records.primary_reading: Ordinary water is the normal material for washing the named body parts and attaining bodily ritual purity; clean earth substitutes when water is unavailable.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The surrounding ayat place this bodily regimen among wholesome food, disciplined sexual relations, covenant fidelity, gratitude, and impartial justice. The material practice belongs to a wider pattern of clean, bounded, obedient conduct.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B003 is retained as the branch of water brought to and applied to a person.
records.activation_trace: The commands فَٱغْسِلُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ and فَٱطَّهَّرُوا۟ make directed application to the body visible, and لِيُطَهِّرَكُمْ states its role. The abductive bridge is from water as a found substance to water conveyed onto named recipients for an intended result; the target therefore contributes enacted purification, not mere availability.
records.negative_evidence: Faces alone do not establish the sheen/freshness branch root_001458/B006. No abundance, reproductive deposition, plating, crystal, or heart-dullness trigger passes the standard.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater sent from the sky is the means by which diverse green growth, grain, dates, grapes, olives, pomegranates, and fruit develop.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Human origination in 6:98 and the rejection in 6:100–101 of invented divine sons, daughters, consort, and child frame vegetal generation as evidence of God's creative agency without projecting creaturely reproduction onto God.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 activates abundant water appearing from the sky and within developing produce; root_001458/B006 activates watery freshness and ripening in fruit. In a contrastive role, root_001458/B004 is activated by the surrounding procreative vocabulary.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ initiates the water's appearance and the repeated فَأَخْرَجْنَا / نُّخْرِجُ sequence tracks it becoming abundant life through multiple produce forms; water gains a cascading, internally productive presence. For root_001458/B006, خَضِرًا, ثَمَرِهِۦٓ إِذَآ أَثْمَرَ, and especially يَنْعِهِۦٓ visibly name freshness and ripening; the target water consequently contributes the moisture-filled sheen and maturity the observer is told to inspect. For root_001458/B004, أَنشَأَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍ وَٰحِدَةٍ (6:98), بَنِينَ وَبَنَٰتٍ (6:100), and وَلَدٌ / صَٰحِبَةٌ (6:101) supply an unusually dense generation frame; the bridge is contrast, so rainwater's life-generation highlights divine creation while the branch's male-fluid mechanism remains creaturely and is expressly inappropriate as an account of God.
records.negative_evidence: The retained root_001458/B004 is not substituted for rain and does not claim that مَآءً denotes reproductive fluid here. No local coating, crystal, or heart-dullness cue qualifies.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The people of the Fire ask the people of the Garden for some literal water to relieve them, but it and the Garden's provision are denied them.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Recognition by marks, the announcement of mercy, and the later pairing of guidance with mercy make the requested water a concrete boundary marker of mercy; worldly social accumulation has become useless, while the smallest relief depends on a provision they rejected.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B003 is retained as water supplied by pouring to a person.
records.activation_trace: أَفِيضُوا۟ عَلَيْنَا is an explicit command to pour or cause flow upon the speakers, مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ names the requested substance, and رَزَقَكُمُ names it as received provision. The bridge is direct transitive delivery, so the target's contribution sharpens from desired water to a begged transfer of provision across a boundary that cannot be crossed.
records.negative_evidence: غَرَّتْهُمُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا in 7:51 supplies deception generally, but no coating, metallic wash, or false-display link ties it locally enough to the water for root_001458/B005. No abundance, reproduction, fruit-freshness, crystal, or heart-water cue qualifies.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater is sent down from a heavy cloud over dead land and brings out every kind of fruit, furnishing the stated analogy for bringing out the dead.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Prayer, restraint from corruption, fear, hope, and nearness of mercy precede the meteorological sequence; the following good/bad land contrast shows that the same incoming mercy discloses the receiving ground's quality. Rain is therefore both revival image and diagnostic event.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 activates water's abundant sky-borne appearance; root_001458/B003 activates directed water-supply.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, سَحَابًا ثِقَالًا and فَأَنزَلْنَا بِهِ ٱلْمَآءَ visibly stage accumulated water appearing from a heavy cloud, with مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ registering its abundant outcome; the target gains the dimension of stored abundance released. For root_001458/B003, سُقْنَٰهُ لِبَلَدٍ مَّيِّتٍ gives the cloud a destination and فَأَنزَلْنَا ... فَأَخْرَجْنَا supplies the delivery-result sequence; the bridge is purposeful conveyance to needy ground, so the water becomes administered mercy rather than undirected rainfall.
records.negative_evidence: The fruits are outputs, but no ripening, moisture-filled sheen, or sweetness cue establishes root_001458/B006. No reproductive, plating, crystal, or heart-dullness branch passes the standard.

records.primary_reading: Literal rainwater descends upon the believers to cleanse them, remove satanic contamination, bind their hearts, and steady their feet.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window integrates sleep, angelic reinforcement, inward reassurance, bodily cleansing, stable footing, and battle command. Water is one material component in a coordinated answer to distress that reaches body, emotion, ground, and action.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 activates water appearing through a descent from the sky; root_001458/B003 activates water deliberately supplied to people for specified effects.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, يُنَزِّلُ عَلَيْكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ is the explicit sky-to-recipient appearance construction; the target gains the force of timely water becoming present where it was needed. For root_001458/B003, عَلَيْكُم, لِّيُطَهِّرَكُم بِهِۦ, and the coordinated purpose clauses specify recipients, instrument, and results; the bridge is directed supply, so the rain reads as provision applied to cleanse and stabilize, not merely weather.
records.negative_evidence: قُلُوبِكُمْ and drowsiness do not activate root_001458/B008: the water's stated action is to bind and strengthen hearts, the opposite of the branch's dullness. No reproductive, plating, freshness, or crystal cue qualifies.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater is the basis of a similitude: it mixes with earth's vegetation, producing a flourishing scene that is abruptly reduced to stubble, like the fleeting life of this world.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding sea rescue followed by immediate transgression enacts the same rapid reversal as the rain-grown landscape. The following call to the enduring abode of peace makes the brilliant but fragile surface a foil to a stable destination.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001458/B002 activates water appearing from the sky and filling terrestrial growth; root_001458/B005 activates deceptive surface-coating or display; root_001458/B006 activates water-like vegetal freshness and sheen.
records.activation_trace: For root_001458/B002, أَنزَلْنَٰهُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ and فَٱخْتَلَطَ بِهِۦ نَبَاتُ ٱلْأَرْضِ visibly move water into growth; the target gains an entering, diffusive abundance that temporarily fills the scene. For root_001458/B005, زُخْرُفَهَا, ٱزَّيَّنَتْ, and the resulting وَظَنَّ أَهْلُهَآ أَنَّهُمْ قَٰدِرُونَ supply the ornamental surface and the false conclusion, while sudden harvest exposes the display; the bridge is the branch's extension from metallic wash to presenting an appearance as more secure than its reality, so the target water becomes an enabler of worldly self-deception without ceasing to be rain. For root_001458/B006, vegetation, ornament, and the contrast with حَصِيدًا / كَأَن لَّمْ تَغْنَ make fresh sheen visibly transient; the water contributes the moist flourishing whose disappearance drives the comparison.
records.negative_evidence: No male-fluid, crystal, or heart-water cue appears. The descent and mixing do not add a distinct pouring-into or watering act beyond the roles already captured by root_001458/B002.

retained_branches.image_ar: كسوة المعدن بماء الذهب أو الفضة
رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The word contributes ordinary water as that over which the throne was before or during the stated creation, while the ayah moves from creation to the testing of human action and resurrection.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayat place concealed and declared things, every creature's provision, and every resting and deposit under divine knowledge; water under the throne therefore enters a window about what is held, known, tested, and finally disclosed.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The hiding/declaring contrast in 11:5 and the unbelievers' dismissal of resurrection in 11:7 sharpen the ayah-level contrast between divine knowledge and human concealment, but they do not visibly turn the water into coating, false display, clarity, abundance, or any other accepted م و ه branch.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001458/B005` would require an actual coating or a more direct deceptive presentation, and `root_001458/B006` is not established merely by أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا. No other branch passes the evidence standard.

records.primary_reading: The water is the flood from which the son expects the mountain to protect him.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The attempted movement toward a mountain is interrupted by a mountain-like wave: the chosen refuge and the approaching danger share an image, while the next ayah shows that the same water obeys commands addressed to earth and sky.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing, entering, or becoming abundant) and `root_001458/B003` (supplying or putting water into something) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001458/B002`, مَوْجٍ كَٱلْجِبَالِ, the intervening wave, drowning, and then غِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ visibly stage overwhelming abundance followed by recession; the branch makes مَآءِ an engulfing quantity rather than a neutral substance. For `root_001458/B003`, the immediately following command يَٰٓأَرْضُ ٱبْلَعِى مَآءَكِ supplies the transitive placement cue: the water feared as uncontrollable in 11:43 is, by abductive contrast, water that can be directed into the earth.
records.negative_evidence: The concealment/coating, reproductive-fluid, sheen, crystal, and heart-dullness branches have no local trigger. The retained branches depend on the visible flood-volume and commanded-entry sequence, not on flood vocabulary alone.

records.primary_reading: The wave rises between father and son and completes the son's separation from the ark.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The wave is both barrier and moving terrain: it answers the son's proposed mountain refuge with the preceding image مَوْجٍ كَٱلْجِبَالِ and makes physical separation coincide with the failed separation from the unbelievers.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001455/B001` already covers the ordinary wave and its surging turbulence; the running ship, mountain-like waves, and interposition intensify that primary image but do not activate a distinct accepted branch.
records.negative_evidence: The target inventory contains no branch other than `root_001455/B001`, so no secondary branch ID can be cited or invented.

records.primary_reading: The son becomes one of those submerged and drowned by the flood.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The passive result closes a sequence of self-protection claims: neither isolation, ascent, nor a mountain can preserve him once the wave comes between them.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The wave, floodwater, and the designation مُغْرَقِينَ fully establish `root_001080/B001`, but that is the primary drowning branch. The earth's swallowing of its water in 11:44 does not explicitly say that the land is saturated, so it does not meet the burden for `root_001080/B003`.
records.negative_evidence: No visible bow-drawing, field takeover, small draught, ornamental bridle, or independently marked killing construction activates `root_001080/B002/B004/B005/B006/B008`. No secondary branch passes.

records.primary_reading: In مَآءَكِ, the water is the earth's floodwater, commanded to be swallowed back into it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The previous ayah presents water as what no mountain can repel; here earth and sky receive terse commands and the apparently unbounded flood is partitioned, withdrawn, and settled.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water entering or becoming abundant) and `root_001458/B003` (putting water into something) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B002` is locally triggered by the sequence of mountain-like wave, drowning, ٱبْلَعِى مَآءَكِ, and غِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ: abundance visibly reverses into entry and depletion, making مَآءَكِ a controllable flood-volume. `root_001458/B003` is triggered by the transitive imperative ٱبْلَعِى with water as its object; the bridge is that commanded swallowing functions as directed placement into the earth, so the target contributes not only substance but routed content.
records.negative_evidence: No coating, reproductive, sheen, crystal, or heart-water cue appears. The two retained branches are supported by distinct local roles, intransitive entry/quantity and transitive directed placement.

records.primary_reading: In وَغِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ, the remaining floodwater is made to recede or diminish.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its recession stands between paired commands to earth and sky and the completion of the affair, so hydraulic decline and judicial closure occur in one compressed sequence.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained.
records.activation_trace: The visible contrast between مَوْجٍ كَٱلْجِبَالِ and غِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ activates `root_001458/B002` as the abundance/entry branch. The abductive bridge is reversal: the same root-image that marks water becoming abundant also makes its ordered diminution salient, changing ٱلْمَآءُ from a static mass into a measured state that can be increased, absorbed, and reduced.
records.negative_evidence: Although the preceding imperative directs the earth to swallow water, this second target is grammatically the subject of recession rather than the object of supplying or pouring, so `root_001458/B003` is not separately retained here. The remaining branches lack triggers.

records.primary_reading: The neighboring plots, vines, crops, and palms are irrigated with one water despite their differing produce.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Uniform input yields nonuniform food; the next ayah's incredulity about new creation is thereby framed by a visible creation in which one supply already produces sharply differentiated outcomes.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The crop list and بِمَآءٍ وَٰحِدٍ strongly specify irrigation, which belongs to the target's primary watering contribution and `root_000722/B003`; the nearby rivers support the setting but do not visibly establish a distinct source-allotment construction under `root_000722/B002`.
records.negative_evidence: There is no belly-fluid, prayer-for-rain, cloud, papyrus, dye-soaking, or forced-heart cue. No other س ق ي branch passes.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the single ordinary water used to irrigate all the adjacent growth.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its oneness is not flattening: the water becomes the stable common term against which differences in plant form and taste are made legible.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (supplying water) and `root_001458/B006` (watery freshness or ripening in fruit) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B003` is directly triggered by يُسْقَىٰ بِمَآءٍ وَٰحِدٍ, which assigns the water an instrumental supplying role; this changes it from mere matter into a shared input distributed across plots. `root_001458/B006` is triggered by أَعْنَٰبٍ, نَخِيلٌ, الثَّمَرَات in 13:3, and preference فِى ٱلْأُكُلِ; because the branch explicitly includes grapes and date-fruit filling with ripening moisture, it makes the one water participate in the distinct freshness and maturation of each fruit.
records.negative_evidence: No local cue supports coating, reproductive fluid, crystal, or heart-dullness. Mere mention of rivers does not by itself establish the abundance/entry branch `root_001458/B002`.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: Water is the desired drink toward which a person stretches open hands, though it never reaches the mouth.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding thunder, angels, and thunderbolts respond within divine power, while the simile centers on a tiny failed transaction: hands, water, and mouth do not complete the requested movement. The following universal prostration deepens the contrast between responsive creation and unanswered invocation.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: بَاسِطِ كَفَّيْهِ, لِيَبْلُغَ فَاهُ, and the repeated negation of reaching make failed access to ordinary water precise. They do not show actual pouring, supplying, abundance, sheen, clarity, coating, reproductive fluid, or heart-water.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001458/B003` is specifically blocked by وَمَا هُوَ بِبَٰلِغِهِ: the desired transfer does not occur. The blindness/light and powerless-patrons contrasts in 13:16 are ayah-level interpretation, not triggers for `root_001458/B007` or `B008`.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater descends from the sky, fills valleys according to their capacities, and bears rising foam.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Water-flow and metal-smelting produce the same disposable surface residue, allowing a physical sorting process to render the truth/falsehood contrast visible; 13:19 then names revelation itself as what has been sent down and recognized as truth.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing or becoming abundant) and `root_001458/B005` (metal coating and deceptive display) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B002` is activated by أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ, the valleys flowing according to capacity, and the torrent carrying raised foam; the branch makes مَآءً a descending quantity whose locally varying abundance exposes capacity. `root_001458/B005` has an unusually visible double trigger: metal is heated لِحِلْيَةٍ أَوْ مَتَٰعٍ, its foam resembles the water's foam, and the sequence explicitly names ٱلْحَقَّ وَٱلْبَٰطِلَ. The bridge is surface versus substance, so water becomes an agent that carries a bright or swollen false surface away while benefit remains.
records.negative_evidence: The coating branch is retained because metalwork and explicit falsehood occur together, not merely because foam is visually suggestive. No reproductive-fluid, crystal, heart-dullness, or watering construction is visible.

retained_branches.image_ar: كسوة المعدن بماء الذهب أو الفضة

records.primary_reading: The valleys flow with the descended water, each according to its capacity.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The grammatical subject is the valleys rather than the water, making landscape capacity itself appear as flow; the later contrast between passing foam and what remains in earth gives that movement an epistemic role.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_000770/B001` already includes causing or undergoing flow and the channel of flow. Valley extension, foam carriage, and remaining benefit all elaborate that primary branch, but no separate accepted extension, sword-tang, tree, beard-side, or flank use is locally instantiated.
records.negative_evidence: The metal-heating comparison does not identify a sword, knife, handle, or tang and therefore cannot activate the higher-burden `root_000770/B003`. No other branch passes.

records.primary_reading: The torrent carries a layer of rising foam generated by the valley flow.
records.ayah_level_surprise: What looks elevated is precisely what the torrent removes, while what benefits people remains low in the earth; the torrent thus performs the parable's separation rather than merely supplying its scenery.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: Carrying foam is ordinary torrent behavior within `root_000770/B001`. Although the flow spreads through several valleys, the text does not supply the distinct blaze, troops, or analogous non-water extension required to make `root_000770/B002` secondary rather than an embellishment of the primary flow.
records.negative_evidence: The nearby metalwork lacks a tang construction, and no sayal tree or human side-part appears. No other branch passes.

records.primary_reading: The obstinate tyrant is made to drink water identified as صَدِيدٍ in Hell.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A verb normally associated with sustaining drink is inverted into punishment; the next ayah slows the act into repeated gulping that cannot be comfortably swallowed, with death approaching from every place but never completed.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000722/B010` is retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_000722/B010` concerns forcing disliked hostility into the heart as though making it drink. Here جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ, the passive يُسْقَىٰ, صَدِيدٍ, and يَتَجَرَّعُهُۥ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُسِيغُهُۥ visibly supply hostility, coercion, aversion, and inward passage; the abductive reversal makes the metaphor bodily, changing the target from neutral administration into punishment forced inside.
records.negative_evidence: The branch is not retained from unpleasant taste alone; passive compulsion, enmity, and failed swallowing jointly anchor it. There is no source-allotment, irrigation, belly-fluid, rain-prayer, cloud, reed, or dye cue.

records.primary_reading: The word remains ordinary water at noun level, radically qualified by صَدِيدٍ as the punishing liquid being gulped.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Water, normally compatible with life, is placed between Hell and a death that repeatedly comes but does not occur; the life-bearing category becomes a vehicle for suspended dying.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The coercive drinking sequence changes the ayah's use of water, but it activates a secondary س ق ي branch rather than another م و ه branch. No visible entry/abundance, pouring, reproductive, coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-water construction occurs.
records.negative_evidence: صَدِيدٍ makes the liquid horrific but is not itself an accepted secondary branch of م و ه. No secondary water-root branch passes.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater is sent down and used to bring out fruits as provision.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window links believers' expenditure from provision to a cosmology of provision: descending water, extracted fruit, navigable sea, rivers, celestial cycles, and finally gifts too numerous to count.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing or becoming abundant), `root_001458/B003` (supplying water), and `root_001458/B006` (watery ripening freshness) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B002` is triggered by أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ and the coordinated sea and rivers, making مَآءً part of system-scale appearing and abundance. `root_001458/B003` is triggered by the causal فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ ... رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ: the water is deliberately supplied as the means of provision. `root_001458/B006` is triggered by ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ and رِزْقًا, with the branch's fruit-ripening moisture supplying the bridge; the target thus contributes freshness and maturation inside the fruit, not only rain outside it.
records.negative_evidence: The three retained branches have separate visible roles: descent/abundance, purposeful supply, and fruit maturation. No reproductive-fluid, coating, crystal, or heart-dullness cue appears.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The sea is the broad water body through which the subjected ships travel.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Sea, rivers, sun, moon, night, and day are all placed in a repeated سَخَّرَ لَكُم pattern, so the potentially trackless expanse becomes an ordered conduit within an inventory of provision.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth) and `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_000086/B002` is activated by رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ, the sequence of sea, rivers, celestial service, and the uncountable نعمة in 14:34; because the branch explicitly extends breadth to wealth and pasture, the sea's expanse becomes a measure of provision's amplitude. `root_000086/B009` is directly triggered by ٱلْفُلْكَ لِتَجْرِىَ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ; it assigns the sea the role of traveled medium, changing the target from water-body alone into an enabled route.
records.negative_evidence: No salt, cleft-ear, exposed meeting, water-holding hollow, womb-depth/redness, bewilderment, accidental encounter, disease, technical medical term, large belly, or unquenched thirst is visible. Breadth is retained through the explicit abundance frame, not from size alone.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater is sent down from the sky and given to the addressees to drink, while their inability to store it is stressed.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding خزائن held with God, descent by known measure, human non-storage, and the following life/death claim make drinking water an entrusted release rather than a possession.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing or descending abundantly), `root_001458/B003` (supplying water), and `root_001458/B004` (male fluid placed in the womb) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B002` is activated by فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ and the خزائن/بِقَدَرٍ sequence: water appears as a measured release from stores. `root_001458/B003` is directly activated by فَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُمُوهُ, which makes the descended water a supplied drink rather than merely precipitation. `root_001458/B004` bears a higher burden, met here by the immediately adjacent ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ and the following نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ: the fertilizing construction supplies a reproductive bridge, so rainwater also resonates as generative fluid deposited into a receptive world.
records.negative_evidence: The reproductive branch is retained only because لَوَٰقِحَ, descent, and the life/death statement converge locally; rain alone would not suffice. No coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness cue appears.

records.primary_reading: In فَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُمُوهُ, God provides the descended water to the addressees as their drink or drinking supply.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The long pronominal construction delivers the sky-water all the way to its human recipients, then immediately denies that they control its خزائن; reception is grammatically close, ownership is denied.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The form أَسْقَيْنَا, its human object, the water object pronoun, and the storage contrast precisely realize the primary source-provision branch `root_000722/B002`. The window contains no separate irrigation, bodily fluid, prayer, rain-cloud noun, reed, dye, or forced-hostility construction.
records.negative_evidence: `root_000722/B001` is conceptually adjacent but adds no surprising role beyond the primary act of giving drink, and `root_000722/B010` has no aversion or hostility cue. No secondary branch passes.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater descends for the addressees, furnishing both drink and the vegetation in which animals graze.
records.ayah_level_surprise: One descent branches into human drink, grazing, crops, olives, palms, grapes, and all fruits, then joins the ordered night and celestial bodies; the window presents water as a branching infrastructure of guidance and sustenance.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing or descending abundantly), `root_001458/B003` (supplying water), and `root_001458/B006` (watery fruit freshness and ripening) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_001458/B002` is triggered by أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ and the branching مِنْهُ ... وَمِنْهُ effects, making water an appearing supply with multiple downstream forms. `root_001458/B003` is triggered by لَّكُم, مِنْهُ شَرَابٌ, grazing, and يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ, assigning it the role of intentionally delivered water for people, animals, and growth. `root_001458/B006` is triggered by ٱلنَّخِيلَ, ٱلْأَعْنَٰبَ, and ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ, so the external rain also contributes internal ripening moisture and freshness.
records.negative_evidence: No reproductive-fluid, coating, crystal, or heart-water cue occurs. The retained branches are anchored by descent, explicit beneficiary/supply constructions, and the branch-specific fruit list.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: شَرَابٌ names the portion of descended water available as ordinary drink.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The repeated partition مِنْهُ شَرَابٌ وَمِنْهُ شَجَرٌ makes drink one visible phase of the same water that becomes grazing and diverse food, rather than an isolated cupful.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000783/B002` (allotted share of water), `root_000783/B007` (permeating or being imbued), and `root_000783/B014` (watered land or green growth) are retained.
records.activation_trace: `root_000783/B002` is activated by لَّكُم مِّنْهُ and the repeated مِنْهُ partition: شَرَابٌ is construed as the human share within one descended supply. `root_000783/B007` is activated by يُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ followed by crops, olives, palms, grapes, and fruits; the abductive bridge is plant uptake, so drinkable water also resonates as liquid permeating growth. `root_000783/B014` is triggered by شَجَرٌ فِيهِ تُسِيمُونَ and the next ayah's green-growth list, changing the target's contribution from consumed liquid to the watered land and vegetation that sustain grazing and food.
records.negative_evidence: No co-drinker, vessel/upper-room, unpleasant-water quality, body-part, neck-rope, craning, false charge, explicit understanding idiom, wealth-spending idiom, or waterskin treatment is visible. Plant permeation and watered growth are retained because the causal بِهِ and concrete vegetation list make both roles local.

records.primary_reading: Literal rain descends from the sky and is the means by which dead earth is restored to life; that transformation is presented as a sign.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah also speaks of something sent down: the Book, whose functions are clarification, guidance, and mercy. The repeated descent gives the rain's revival a local analogue in revelation without making the water cease to be literal rain.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (supplying water) is retained: the rain is heard as deliberately furnished provision, not merely as present water. `root_001458/B006` (watery freshness in fruit) is also retained: the target's life-giving contribution extends into the ripening freshness of the window's dates and grapes.
records.activation_trace: For B003, the visible trigger is the next ayah's `نُّسْقِيكُم ... لَّبَنًا ... لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ`; the bridge is the sequence from God sending water to God giving drink, which recasts the rain as administered sustenance. For B006, `ثَمَرَٰتِ ٱلنَّخِيلِ وَٱلْأَعْنَٰبِ` supplies the branch's exact fruit image; the bridge is that descended water becomes the internal freshness by which fruit reaches useful provision.
records.negative_evidence: B002 is not retained because no unusual appearance or abundance of water is foregrounded beyond ordinary rainfall. B004, B005, B007, and B008 lack local triggers.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the liquid offered in answer to a cry for relief, but this water-like liquid burns faces and intensifies punishment rather than relieving it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The surrounding window opposes this enclosed fire, destructive drink, and bad resting place to gardens with flowing rivers and a good resting place. The same expectation of relief is thus split by the preceding choice between belief and disbelief.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (supplying water by watering or pouring) is retained. It makes the target not just a harmful substance but a deliberately furnished counter-relief.
records.activation_trace: The construction `يَسْتَغِيثُوا۟ يُغَاثُوا۟ بِمَآءٍ` is the visible trigger: a request is answered by having liquid supplied. The abductive bridge is the perverse fit between the transitive supplying branch and an answer that defeats the purpose of asking; the water's contribution becomes punitive provision.
records.negative_evidence: The nearby `ذَهَبٍ` does not by itself activate B005's gold coating, and `كَٱلْمُهْلِ` supplies no coating action. B002, B004, B006, B007, and B008 have no adequate local trigger.

records.primary_reading: `ٱلشَّرَابُ` names the offered liquid specifically under its aspect as something drunk, and condemns it as the worst drink.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its evaluative opposite appears two ayat later: the punished receive a bad drink and bad resting place, while the faithful receive rivers and a good resting place. Drink therefore participates in the window's complete reversal of hospitality.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000783/B005` (drinkable but unpleasant water) is retained. The branch sharpens the distinction between being presented as drink and being beneficial or pleasant.
records.activation_trace: `بِئْسَ ٱلشَّرَابُ`, reinforced by `يَشْوِى ٱلْوُجُوهَ`, is the visible quality judgment. The bridge is that the liquid remains designated as drink precisely while its sensory and bodily effects negate ordinary refreshment; the target contributes coerced or punitive drinkability, not nourishment.
records.negative_evidence: B001 supplies the primary drinking sense. No drinking place or vessel, co-drinker, absorption, neck motion, rope, false charge, understanding, expenditure, waterskin treatment, or watered land visibly activates B002-B004 or B006-B014.

records.primary_reading: The garden's literal water may recede beyond reach, leaving its owner unable to recover it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: In the larger sequence, inaccessible water anticipates the garden's total collapse, the owner's useless expenditure, and the absence of any supporting group. A supposedly owned resource exposes the limits of ownership and power.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `غَوْرًا` and `فَلَن تَسْتَطِيعَ لَهُۥ طَلَبًا` strongly specify loss and inaccessibility, but they elaborate the primary fate of ordinary water rather than activate another inventoried branch.
records.negative_evidence: B002 concerns water appearing, entering, or becoming abundant; this ayah presents the opposite result, and retaining it would not add a distinct contribution. No watering, reproductive fluid, coating, freshness, crystal clarity, or heart-water cue supports B003-B008.

records.primary_reading: Descended water makes earth's vegetation mingle and flourish before it becomes dry debris scattered by winds; this cycle serves as the likeness of worldly life.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The image follows a ruined garden and precedes the naming of wealth and children as worldly adornment, while divine sovereignty and enduring good deeds frame the transient growth. The water's productive force is therefore real but radically temporary.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B006` (watery sheen or freshness in growth and fruit) is retained. It adds the short-lived visible freshness that makes worldly growth attractive before its collapse.
records.activation_trace: `نَبَاتُ ٱلْأَرْضِ`, its abrupt change to `هَشِيمًا`, and the adjacent `زِينَةُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا` visibly form a freshness/adornment-to-dryness sequence. The bridge is that water supplies not only growth but the appealing moist bloom whose disappearance makes the comparison effective.
records.negative_evidence: Although `زِينَةُ` can suggest surface display, no metal, gilding, coating, or explicit falsification meets the higher burden for B005. B002-B004 and B007-B008 lack branch-specific triggers.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: Literal rain is sent down and used to bring forth diverse pairs or kinds of plants.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window joins the earth as bed and network of paths to food for humans and livestock, then to human creation from earth, return into it, and later emergence. Plant emergence by water locally anticipates another emergence from the same earth.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (supplying water by watering) is retained. The target becomes purposeful agricultural provision ordered toward the consumers named next.
records.activation_trace: `أَنزَلَ ... مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ ... نَبَاتٍ`, followed by `كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعَٰمَكُمْ`, visibly links supplied water, watered growth, and beneficiaries. The bridge is the controlled means-result-purpose sequence; rain contributes as an act of provisioning rather than an isolated weather event.
records.negative_evidence: Plant diversity alone does not establish B006's specific watery sheen or ripening-fruit image. B002, B004-B005, and B007-B008 have no visible local trigger.

records.primary_reading: Water is presented as the material or means from which every living thing is made.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The claim stands within a sequence of ordered cosmic makings: joined heaven and earth are opened, mountains stabilize, paths guide, and the sky is protected. Water's relation to life is one component of an intelligible habitation whose stated demand is faith.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ حَىٍّ` maximally enlarges the primary life-bearing role of ordinary water, but no separate form or image from another branch appears in the five-ayah window.
records.negative_evidence: Universal life may invite association with reproductive fluid, but there is no local male, womb, seed, or gestational cue to satisfy B004. No appearance/abundance, watering act, coating, freshness, clarity, or heart-water trigger supports B002-B003 or B005-B008.

records.primary_reading: Literal rain falls upon inert earth, which moves, swells, and grows every beautiful kind; the event supplies an observable demonstration of revival.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Within the same ayah, a detailed human sequence from dust through embryonic stages, birth, maturity, and decline is paired with the earth's response to rain. The following declarations make both sequences evidence for reviving the dead and raising those in graves.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B004` (male generative fluid deposited in the womb) is retained as an echo, while literal rain remains primary. `root_001458/B006` (watery freshness and beauty in growth) is also retained.
records.activation_trace: For B004, `نُّطْفَةٍ` and `نُقِرُّ فِى ٱلْأَرْحَامِ` are unusually explicit local triggers for reproductive fluid and placement in the womb; the bridge is the ayah's deliberate sequencing of human gestation and rain-generated terrestrial growth, making the target water echo generative fluid across the two revivals. For B006, `ٱهْتَزَّتْ وَرَبَتْ وَأَنۢبَتَتْ ... بَهِيجٍ` visibly supplies fresh swelling and attractive growth; the branch makes water the source of perceptible freshness, not only biological causation.
records.negative_evidence: B002 and B003 would largely restate descent and causal watering already carried by the primary reading. No coating, crystal, or dull-heart trigger supports B005, B007, or B008.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: Rain sent down from the sky causes the earth to become green, manifesting divine care and knowledge.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The gentle greening sits between vast acts of control: night and day enter one another, while ships move in the sea and the sky is held from falling. The small visible change in the earth thus belongs to the same governance as the cosmic structures around it.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B006` (a water-like sheen of freshness) is retained. It makes the water's contribution specifically the earth's newly visible freshness.
records.activation_trace: `فَتُصْبِحُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مُخْضَرَّةً` is a direct visual trigger for B006's freshness image. The bridge is the immediate water-to-greenness construction; the branch brings the surface transformation into the target, so rain is read as imparting fresh appearance as well as sustaining life.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing indicates unusual water abundance, a distinct watering recipient, reproductive fluid, coating, crystal, or heart-water; B002-B005 and B007-B008 are not retained.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: A measured quantity of rain is sent down, lodged in the earth, and remains liable to removal by the same power that provided it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window begins with resurrection and ordered creation overhead, then moves from measured water to abundant gardens, fruit, and food. The contrast between measured, removable input and abundant output makes sustenance depend on controlled preservation rather than mere rainfall.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (putting water into something) is retained: the target is deliberately placed and stored provision. `root_001458/B006` (fruit filling with ripening moisture) is retained: the measured water unfolds as freshness inside the named palms, grapes, and abundant fruits.
records.activation_trace: For B003, `فَأَسْكَنَّٰهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ` visibly describes water being put and made to remain in a receptacle, while `ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ` confirms control over that placement; the target therefore contributes a managed reserve. For B006, `جَنَّٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَٰبٍ` and `فَوَٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ` exactly trigger the branch's fruit image; the bridge is the repeated `بِهِۦ`, which carries the stored water forward into ripened abundance.
records.negative_evidence: B002's abundance is not retained because the water itself is explicitly measured; the abundance belongs to its fruit effect. B004-B005 and B007-B008 lack local triggers.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The thirsty person mistakes a mirage for literal water but, on reaching it, finds nothing; the failed expectation figures the unbelievers' works.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah promises provision without reckoning, whereas this ayah ends with a fully settled account. The next ayah moves from nonexistent desert water to an overwhelming deep sea whose layered darkness prevents sight, giving two opposite failures of perception.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B005` (coating or deceptive presentation) is retained. The target contributes the apparent water-like surface by which absence is presented as satisfying reality.
records.activation_trace: `كَسَرَابٍۭ`, `يَحْسَبُهُ ٱلظَّمْـَٔانُ مَآءً`, and `لَمْ يَجِدْهُ شَيْـًٔا` form an explicit appearance-belief-disconfirmation sequence. The bridge is B005's extension from surface coating to presenting what is false as real; here the water word names the attractive false presentation, sharpening the works' deceptive promise.
records.negative_evidence: B007's clarity is not activated by failed seeing, and the sea in the next ayah is a separate image rather than evidence of B002 abundance in the target. B003-B004, B006, and B008 lack local cues.

retained_branches.image_ar: كسوة المعدن بماء الذهب أو الفضة

records.primary_reading: Ordinary water is presented as the common created medium from which every moving creature originates, before the ayah differentiates creatures by their modes of walking.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window moves from the visible formation and descent of weather to an unseen commonality within animal creation, then to clear signs, guidance, and a disputed profession of faith. The creatures' bodily diversity thus becomes an epistemic sign continuous with the cloud process, not merely a zoological list.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained. Its image of water appearing, emerging, and descending makes the target water a dynamically administered life-source rather than inert source material.
records.activation_trace: In 24:43, `يُزْجِى سَحَابًا`, `ٱلْوَدْقَ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ خِلَٰلِهِۦ`, and `يُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ` visibly stage gathering, emergence, and descent. Because `root_001458/B002` expressly covers water appearing and the sky pouring water, that external process supplies an abductive model for `مِّن مَّآءٍ`: the same governed movement that makes water appear in the world also stands behind water's generative contribution within living creatures.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001458/B004` is not retained: `خَلَقَ كُلَّ دَآبَّةٍ` is generative, but the window supplies no male, womb, lineage, or deposition cue specific enough to the branch. No local trigger supports watering/pouring, plating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness branches.

records.primary_reading: The target denotes clean, purifying rainwater sent down from the sky.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding alternation of sleep and daytime rising is followed by water reviving a dead town; the life-cycle image then becomes a test of remembrance when the distributed gift meets widespread ingratitude.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B003` are retained. B002 presents the rain as water made to appear from above in abundance; B003 adds purposeful delivery to recipients. Together they make `مَآءً طَهُورًا` both a descending event and an administered provision.
records.activation_trace: `أَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ` directly activates the sky-pouring scope of `root_001458/B002`. In 25:49, `وَنُسْقِيَهُۥ ... أَنْعَٰمًا وَأَنَاسِىَّ كَثِيرًا` visibly turns the descended water into intentional giving, activating the watering/supplying image of `root_001458/B003`. The bridge is the explicit sequence descent, revival, and giving drink: the target's purity serves a directed economy of life.
records.negative_evidence: Revival of the town does not by itself supply the face, speech, fruit-ripening, or visible-sheen cue required for B006. Nothing locally activates reproductive fluid, plating, crystal, or heart-dullness.

records.primary_reading: Water is the generative material from which a human being is created.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah holds two waters apart with a barrier, while the focus ayah turns water into a human and then joins humans through descent and marriage. The window therefore juxtaposes divinely maintained separation with divinely made relation.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B004` is retained. Its male reproductive-fluid image narrows the generic material sense without displacing it, so the target also contributes the bodily means through which `نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا` become possible.
records.activation_trace: The local sequence `خَلَقَ مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ بَشَرًا فَجَعَلَهُۥ نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا` supplies creation, a human offspring-bearing subject, descent, and affinity. Those unusually concentrated kinship cues activate `root_001458/B004`; the abductive bridge is that reproductive fluid is the water-local mechanism connecting individual creation to extended lineage.
records.negative_evidence: The two seas in 25:53 sharpen the ayah-level separation/connection contrast but do not activate another branch of م و ه. No supplying verb, water-emergence construction, metallic coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness cue passes the threshold.

records.primary_reading: The target is rainwater sent from the sky as the cause by which flourishing gardens grow.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The destructive rain of 27:58 is answered by life-bearing rain in 27:60. The latter's garden beauty is then made evidence in a repeated challenge to association, so water's effect is simultaneously ecological and argumentative.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B006` are retained. B002 adds the event of water appearing from the sky; B006 adds water-like freshness and visible beauty in vegetation. The target consequently produces not only plant life but the garden's manifest `بَهْجَةٍ`.
records.activation_trace: `أَنزَلَ ... مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً` directly activates the sky-pouring image of `root_001458/B002`. The result `حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍ` together with `شَجَرَهَا` visibly activates the flourishing, moisture-borne freshness of `root_001458/B006`. The bridge is the explicit causal `بِهِۦ`: the water's descent becomes perceptible as sheen, freshness, and delight in what grows.
records.negative_evidence: `لَكُم` indicates benefit but is not an act of watering or pouring into a recipient precise enough for B003. No reproductive, plating, crystal, or heart-water cue occurs.

records.primary_reading: Moses reaches or comes to the water-place of Midian.
records.ayah_level_surprise: His fearful departure and request for guidance end at a crowded water source where arrival immediately becomes an encounter with unequal access; the guided road thus leads into an unannounced act of service and eventual safety.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001640/B002` and `root_001640/B007` are retained. B002 makes the arrival an encounter with a socially timed water-share; B007 makes it entry into an ordered succession in which some users precede others.
records.activation_trace: `لَا نَسْقِى حَتَّىٰ يُصْدِرَ ٱلرِّعَآءُ` visibly gives the women a delayed access time, activating the apportioned or timed watering image of `root_001640/B002`. The crowd `أُمَّةً ... يَسْقُونَ`, the women held `مِن دُونِهِم`, and the ورود/صدور sequence display precedence and successive entry, activating `root_001640/B007`. The bridge is that Moses does not merely arrive geographically: he enters a regulated human sequence at the resource, which determines the moral significance of what follows.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing marks a fever cycle, vein, rose color, or drooping length. The repeated schedule and precedence cues are specific; no other branch is retained from the broad fact of arrival alone.

records.primary_reading: The target names the actual water source at Midian around which people and livestock gather.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A physical resource becomes the place where crowd power, the women's restraint, Moses' intervention, recompense, and rescue from fear are successively disclosed.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained. The branch of deliberately supplying water changes the target from a mere destination into the medium of a concrete service performed for others.
records.activation_trace: The same window repeats `يَسْقُونَ`, `لَا نَسْقِى`, `فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا`, and `مَا سَقَيْتَ لَنَا`. These overt س ق ي acts visibly activate the watering/pouring role of `root_001458/B003`. The abductive bridge is enacted rather than thematic: the water's narrative contribution is realized through who can deliver it, who must wait, and who gives it on another's behalf.
records.negative_evidence: The crowd does not show the water itself appearing, seeping, entering, or becoming abundant, so B002 is not retained. There is no trigger for reproductive fluid, coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-water.

records.primary_reading: The men are actively giving water to their animals at the source, the direct giving-to-drink sense represented by the root's primary branch.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The ordinary public act is framed by the two women's enforced distance and is then answered by Moses performing that same act specifically for them.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `أُمَّةً مِّنَ ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْقُونَ` supplies a direct agent, act, and implied livestock recipients. The later `فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا` repeats that direct action but does not introduce a different accepted س ق ي branch.
records.negative_evidence: Waiting until the shepherds depart concerns access to the source, not irrigation of land or crops under `root_000722/B003`, and the men do not create a permanent supply under B002. No bodily fluid, rain-cloud noun, dyeing, hostile heart-saturation, or prayer-for-rain cue appears.

records.primary_reading: The women say that they do not water their animals until the shepherds withdraw; the verb remains direct giving-to-drink, here under negation and delay.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The negated act exposes constrained agency: their problem is not lack of knowledge or intention but their position behind the crowd and their elderly father, a condition reversed when Moses waters for them.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `لَا نَسْقِى حَتَّىٰ يُصْدِرَ ٱلرِّعَآءُ` and the answering `فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا` keep the same direct watering action while changing agent and beneficiary. The sequence adds social force to the primary sense but supplies no distinct lexical branch.
records.negative_evidence: The delayed turn does not make the target an irrigation share or channel under `root_000722/B003`, nor does it mean establishing available water under B002. Moses' later prayer concerns need and descended good, not a formula seeking rain under B006; the remaining minor branches lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The target is rainwater whose descent restores dead earth to life.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The visible death-and-life cycle of land is immediately set beside the merely playful `ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا` and the emphatic true life, `ٱلْحَيَوَانُ`, of the next abode. Water therefore supplies an observable model for a distinction the speakers verbally concede but fail to reason through.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained. The branch's appearance and sky-pouring image makes the target an arriving influx that changes the state of the earth, not simply a substance present on it.
records.activation_trace: `نَّزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً` directly realizes the sky-descending scope of `root_001458/B002`, and `فَأَحْيَا بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ` displays the state-change produced by its arrival. The abductive bridge is the explicit descent-to-revival sequence: water contributes a perceptible transition that underwrites the window's larger life contrast.
records.negative_evidence: No one waters a recipient or pours water into a vessel, so B003 is not activated. Earthly revival without a face, speech, ripening fruit, or explicit sheen is insufficient for B006; the cognition failure `لَا يَعْقِلُونَ` lacks the heart-water construction needed for B008.

records.primary_reading: Rainwater descends from the sky and revives the earth after its death.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The target lies inside a sensory and cognitive sequence: differences are signs for knowers, nightly rest and seeking provision are signs for hearers, lightning is shown between fear and hope, and revived earth is a sign for reasoners. The following summons from the earth makes agricultural emergence anticipate human emergence.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained. Its water-appearance and sky-pouring branch adds eventfulness to the target: the life-bearing water is made to arrive out of the feared and hoped-for sky.
records.activation_trace: `يُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً` directly activates the celestial descent covered by `root_001458/B002`; `ٱلْبَرْقَ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا` supplies the immediately visible precursor to that arrival, and `فَيُحْىِۦ بِهِ` states its concrete result. The bridge joins anticipation, appearance, and revival, so the target contributes the resolved gift within the fear/hope polarity.
records.negative_evidence: `يَعْقِلُونَ` is a general cognition cue, not the specific abundant-heart-water idiom required for B008. No watering act, reproductive context, ripening-fruit sheen, plating, or crystal image appears; no further branch is retained.

records.primary_reading: The target is rainwater sent down to cause the earth to grow every noble kind of vegetation.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The promised gardens of bliss in 31:8 are followed by a terrestrial scene in which water produces `كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ`; that visible creation then grounds the challenge to show what rival objects have created and leads into the command to give thanks.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B006` are retained. B002 makes the target a descending appearance of water; B006 adds the moisture-borne freshness and excellence displayed in the `زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ` that it produces.
records.activation_trace: `أَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً` directly triggers the sky-pouring scope of `root_001458/B002`. The causal continuation `فَأَنۢبَتْنَا ... مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ` visibly joins moist growth to a term of fine quality, activating the plant-freshness image of `root_001458/B006`. The bridge is that the water's contribution culminates not in undifferentiated biomass but in flourishing kinds whose quality can be seen and answered with gratitude.
records.negative_evidence: There is no direct act of giving water to a person, animal, vessel, or specific tree for B003. No reproductive-fluid, coating, crystal, or heart-dullness trigger is present.

records.primary_reading: Here water denotes the lowly reproductive fluid from whose extracted portion human progeny is made; this is the direct contextual sense represented by `root_001458/B004`, not a secondary overlay.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window stages an ascent from clay, through lowly fluid, to formed humanity receiving spirit, hearing, sight, and hearts. The material smallness of the origin sharpens both the gift of those faculties and the rebuke `قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ`.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B008` is retained as a contrastive resonance. Its idiom of excessive heart-water as dullness makes the target's humble bodily fluid a foil for the inner faculty that can remain unresponsive despite being bestowed.
records.activation_trace: The next ayah explicitly names `ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ`, supplying the heart locus required by `root_001458/B008`, and immediately qualifies the recipients with `قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ`, a visible failure of inward response. The abductive bridge is contrast: after the target water accounts for bodily descent, the heart-water idiom diagnoses possible dullness in the elevated human interior. This supplements, rather than replaces, the reproductive-fluid reading.
records.negative_evidence: B004 is primary here and is therefore not counted as secondary. `أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ` is too general to activate the face, speech, or fruit sheen of B006; no water descent, watering, plating, or crystal cue appears.

retained_branches.image_ar: كثرة ماء القلب على جهة البلادة

records.primary_reading: The target is literal water driven to barren land so that crops emerge for animals and people to eat.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window first asks hearers to learn from ruined generations and then asks viewers to see barren ground made productive. The demanded `ٱلْفَتْحُ` and the judgment answer that follow make this ordinary food cycle a nearby demonstration of decisive change and belated recognition.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B003` are retained. B002 casts the water as entering and becoming manifest in dry land; B003 casts it as intentionally conveyed into a recipient. The target thus contributes both state-changing arrival and directed supply.
records.activation_trace: `نَسُوقُ ٱلْمَآءَ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْجُرُزِ` visibly supplies movement into land, activating the entry/appearance image of `root_001458/B002`; the purposeful transitive `نَسُوقُ ... إِلَى` activates the supplying/putting-water-into image of `root_001458/B003`. `فَنُخْرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرْعًا` confirms the result. The abductive bridge is the directed route from giver to barren recipient: water is not merely present but conducted so that hidden productivity becomes visible nourishment.
records.negative_evidence: Although crops emerge, the window supplies no ripening fruit, watery sheen, or explicit beauty cue precise enough for B006. No reproductive, plating, crystal, or heart-water branch is locally triggered.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes ordinary rainwater sent down from the sky and made the means by which differently colored fruits are brought forth.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window moves from rejected messengers, clear proofs, and an illuminating book to visible differences of color in fruit, rock, people, and animals, and then to the learned who fear God. Rain is thus placed inside a larger movement from a divine sending to differentiated, readable signs; that movement enriches the ayah without turning the water into “revelation.”
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` (water appearing, entering, or becoming abundant) and `root_001458/B006` (watery freshness or ripening sheen) are retained. B002 makes the water a hidden input whose entry becomes manifest in produce; B006 makes its contribution include the inward freshness that surfaces as ripened color.
records.activation_trace: For B002, `أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦ` supplies the descent-to-emergence sequence, and the bridge is that water received from above becomes visibly present through what it brings out. For B006, `ثَمَرَٰتٍ مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَٰنُهَا` directly supplies fruit and visible ripening/color cues; the branch inventory specifically locates watery freshness in fruit. Together they shift the target from generic rain to a medium whose concealed entry becomes outward freshness and differentiation.
records.negative_evidence: The illumination and clear proofs do not establish mirror/crystal clarity (`root_001458/B007`), and the nearby denial does not establish deceptive plating (`root_001458/B005`). No cue supports seminal fluid or dull “heart-water.”

records.primary_reading: The word is ordinary rainwater: God sends it down, conducts it into springs in the earth, and uses it to produce vegetation that later dries and breaks apart.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The plant’s movement from color to yellow wreckage is called a reminder, then the window contrasts hard hearts with skins and hearts that soften toward God’s reminder and the best discourse. The material cycle therefore becomes a diagnostic image of receptivity, hardness, softening, and remembrance.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B006` are retained. B002 adds subterranean entry and reappearance to the target. B006 adds a carefully bounded resonance of attractive speech and renewed pliancy, so the water’s softening work in the physical sequence helps frame the later response to discourse.
records.activation_trace: B002 is directly triggered by `فَسَلَكَهُۥ يَنَٰبِيعَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ`: water is inserted into the earth and reappears as springs, exactly the branch’s entry/appearance image. B006 is triggered by `أَحْسَنَ ٱلْحَدِيثِ` together with `تَلِينُ جُلُودُهُمْ وَقُلُوبُهُمْ`; the branch includes sweetness of speech and watery freshness, and the abductive bridge is that the water-softened growth cycle supplies a physical analogue for discourse making receptive bodies and hearts pliant. This supplements, rather than replaces, the rainwater reading.
records.negative_evidence: `قَاسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم` is hardness, not the dullness idiom of abundant heart-water in `root_001458/B008`. No visible coating, crystal/mirror, or reproductive cue supports B005, B007, or B004.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The target is literal water sent onto a still, humbled earth, after which the earth moves, swells, and lives; this is offered as evidence for reviving the dead.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The surrounding commands oppose worship of created heavenly signs to worship of their Creator, while the earth itself passes from `خَٰشِعَةً` to vigorous motion. Humility is therefore not lifelessness: under God’s act it becomes the posture from which responsive life appears.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` (supplying water by watering or pouring) is retained. It makes the noun contribute not only a reviving substance but an intentionally delivered supply directed to a recipient.
records.activation_trace: The construction `أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهَا ٱلْمَآءَ` visibly directs water onto the earth, and `أَحْيَاهَا` states the result. The bridge to B003 is the transitive recipient pattern: the earth is supplied with water and responds. The branch thus sharpens the target as administered life-provision within the resurrection proof.
records.negative_evidence: The ayah does not show seepage, a well, a ship, or marked abundance sufficient for B002. Motion and swelling are not fruit-ripening or facial/speech sheen, so B006 is not retained; the remaining branches lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: This is literal rainwater sent from the sky in a measured amount, by which a dead land is revived as an analogy for human emergence.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window joins an earth made a cradle with paths, measured rain, revived land, and conveyances made rideable. Resurrection is embedded in a sequence of proportioned provision, traversable routes, and controlled movement rather than presented as an isolated marvel.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained. The measured descent and its directed reviving result activate supplying or pouring, making the target an apportioned provision rather than undifferentiated rainfall.
records.activation_trace: `نَزَّلَ ... مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ` supplies the deliberate delivery and measure, while `فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا` supplies the recipient and effect. The bridge is that B003’s transitive supplying image is locally realized as a measured dose assigned to dead land. The target consequently bears the added force of calibrated life-provision.
records.negative_evidence: `بِقَدَرٍ` resists an inference of sheer abundance under B002, and the window contains no fruit-ripening sheen for B006, no crystal/mirror clarity, and no cue for B004, B005, or B008.

records.primary_reading: The first water target denotes the water composing one of the promised garden’s rivers, explicitly characterized as not becoming stale or altered.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The four garden rivers are distinguished by preserved or desirable sensory qualities, then set against hot water that destroys inwardly. This contrast follows the opposition between clear evidence and evil made attractive, so the ayah tests apparent and actual quality without making the river water itself a metaphor.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The local work is fully carried by ordinary water plus the explicit modifier `غَيْرِ ءَاسِنٍ`. Neither the river construction nor the contrast with the later hot water visibly instantiates another branch of م و ه strongly enough to alter this first occurrence.
records.negative_evidence: `غَيْرِ ءَاسِنٍ` states absence of staleness, not mirror/crystal identity or optical clarity, so `root_001458/B007` is not retained. The later `سُقُوا۟ مَآءً حَمِيمًا` supplies B003 only for the separately administered second water target; importing it into this first river-water occurrence would erase the ayah’s contrast.

records.primary_reading: Within the negation `غَيْرِ ءَاسِنٍ`, the adjective contributes the rejected property of water becoming stale, foul, or altered; the river water never has that quality.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its negated alteration participates in a larger contrast between garden liquids whose good qualities remain intact and the destructive hot water of the fire, while the surrounding ayat contrast clear evidence with desires that distort judgment.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `مَّآءٍ غَيْرِ ءَاسِنٍ` directly fixes the target in the ordinary stale-water branch. No other ء س ن image is locally named or enacted.
records.negative_evidence: There is no well air, dizziness, fainting, or death from fumes to activate `root_000033/B002`. No ropes, paternal likeness, kick, or named game supports B005-B008; the later intestinal cutting is not evidence for any of them.

records.primary_reading: The plural names the drinkers for whom the wine river is a delight.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The next ayah presents listeners who hear the Prophet but immediately ask what he just said, followed by sealed hearts. Enjoyable drinking is thus placed beside failed reception: bodily intake and meaningful uptake sharply diverge.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000783/B005` (drinkable but unpleasant water) and `root_000783/B011` (absorbing as understanding) are retained. B005 turns the garden drinkers into one pole of a sensory contrast with recipients made to drink hot water. B011 adds a reception contrast: these drinkers truly take in delight, whereas the nearby listeners do not take in speech with understanding.
records.activation_trace: B005 is triggered by `سُقُوا۟ مَآءً حَمِيمًا فَقَطَّعَ أَمْعَآءَهُمْ`, an explicit later ingestion of maximally unpleasant water; the bridge is the opposed quality of what each group receives. B011 is triggered by `يَسْتَمِعُ إِلَيْكَ` followed by `مَاذَا قَالَ ءَانِفًا`, a visible hearing-without-grasping sequence; since B011 lexicalizes drinking as understanding, it makes `لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ` resonate with successful uptake, in contrast to sealed-hearted listening.
records.negative_evidence: The rivers do not assign scheduled water shares, so B002 is not activated for this target. There is no rope fastening, neck craning, false accusation, waterskin treatment, or watered-land expression to support B008-B010 or B013-B014.

records.primary_reading: The passive verb contributes the compelled administration of hot water to the people of the fire.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same ayah that offers multiple delightful rivers reverses water-giving into punishment: delivery remains, but benefit becomes inward destruction.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The passive construction `سُقُوا۟ مَآءً حَمِيمًا` and its result `فَقَطَّعَ أَمْعَآءَهُمْ` fully instantiate direct giving-to-drink, the target’s primary contribution. They do not independently instantiate another س ق ي branch.
records.negative_evidence: No enduring water source or irrigation share supports B002-B003, no prayer or rain cloud supports B006-B007, and the sealed hearts in the following ayah do not by themselves show the repeated hostile speech required for `root_000722/B010`.

records.primary_reading: The second water target denotes literal scalding water administered to the people of the fire and cutting their intestines.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Water, normally associated in this ayah with the garden’s stable river, is retained as the same ordinary substance-category but given an opposite temperature, mode of delivery, and bodily effect.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained. It makes this occurrence not merely hot liquid but water intentionally supplied to a recipient in a punitive act.
records.activation_trace: The immediately governing passive verb `سُقُوا۟` (س ق ي, direct giving to drink) is an exact visible trigger for B003’s supplying-water image, and `فَقَطَّعَ أَمْعَآءَهُمْ` fixes the consequence.
