The bridge is grammatical and causal: this water reaches the recipients by administered watering. The branch changes the noun’s contribution from substance alone to an imposed delivery-event.
records.negative_evidence: Heat and intestinal damage do not show water appearing in a well or entering a ship, so B002 is not retained. No fruit sheen, crystal clarity, deceptive coating, reproductive fluid, or dull-heart idiom is locally instantiated.

records.primary_reading: The adjective specifies intensely hot or scalding water; its heat explains the destructive bodily result.
records.ayah_level_surprise: It converts the shared category “water” from an unaltered garden good into an instrument of torment, while the recipients’ immortality in fire prevents the damage from resolving into ordinary death.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `مَآءً حَمِيمًا` directly selects the hot-water branch, and `فَقَطَّعَ أَمْعَآءَهُمْ` supplies its concrete effect. No additional ح م م image is required to explain the target.
records.negative_evidence: `ٱلنَّارِ` alone does not visibly provide charcoal, soot, or blackness for `root_000001/B001`. Intestinal destruction does not establish a decree or approaching death under B010, especially since the subject is `خَٰلِدٌ فِى ٱلنَّارِ`; no kinship, bathhouse, fever, sweat, sound, or aiming cue supports the other branches.

records.primary_reading: The target is blessed rainwater sent from the sky and used to grow gardens and harvestable grain.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding `تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ` and the following `كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ` make the rain-grown provision a visible mnemonic of resurrection. Its everyday production of food becomes instruction for an otherwise unseen return.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B006` is retained. It adds the water-like freshness and ripening moisture that becomes visible in attractive growth and date produce.
records.activation_trace: The window gives `بَهِيجٍ`, then growth `بِهِۦ`, and specifically `ٱلنَّخْلَ ... لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ`. B006 explicitly includes freshness and moisture filling date fruit as it ripens. The bridge is that the blessed water’s inward presence becomes the visible freshness and ordered ripening of the palms; the target therefore contributes manifested vitality, not rainfall alone.
records.negative_evidence: Descent from the sky without an explicit abundance, seepage, well, or entry image is insufficient for B002 here. The growth effect does not add a separate pouring/supplying event beyond the primary rain construction, and no cue supports coating, crystal, seminal fluid, or heart-water.

retained_branches.image_ar: رونق كالماء في الوجه والكلام والثمر

records.primary_reading: The word denotes literal rainwater pouring forcefully through the opened “doors” of the sky.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The torrent answers the preceding plea for victory, then water bursts from the earth, meets the descending water according to a decreed command, and bears the vessel. What looks like weather is narrated as a coordinated answer and judgment.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained. It contributes the branch’s marked image of the sky pouring much water, turning generic rain into overwhelming appearance and abundance.
records.activation_trace: `فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ` supplies an opening, `بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ` supplies forceful continuous pouring, and the next ayah’s `فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ` supplies accumulated convergence. These are direct local triggers for B002. The target consequently carries torrential emergence as an instrument coordinated with the earth’s waters.
records.negative_evidence: The vessel is carried on water; the text does not say water entered it, and no deliberate act of giving someone water activates B003. No fruit, sheen, crystal, plating, reproductive, or heart-water cue is present.

records.primary_reading: The singular noun gathers the waters released from the earth and pouring from the sky; they meet in fulfillment of a decreed command.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Sky “doors,” earth “eyes,” converging water, and a vessel moving under divine eyes make the flood a system of opened channels, watched rescue, and commanded convergence rather than an undirected mass.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained. It adds water’s appearance from the land and its massive accumulation to the collective singular target.
records.activation_trace: The prior `بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ`, the current `فَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا`, and `فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ` form a visible sky-pouring/ground-emergence/convergence sequence. B002 covers both abundant sky-water and water appearing from land. The branch changes `ٱلْمَآءُ` from a generic collective into coordinated abundance emerging through distinct channels.
records.negative_evidence: `وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ` shows carrying on a craft, not water entering it. No recipient is intentionally watered for B003, and the remaining branches lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The target is literal water made the object of a division between the community and the she-camel, with each drinking turn attended at its time.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A basic shared resource becomes the structure of a test: announcement, allocation, attendance, breach, and punishment follow in tight sequence. Water organizes public obligation before the violence exposes refusal of that order.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained. It adds the image of intentionally supplying water to recipients, here through an explicit allocation rather than an undirected natural source.
records.activation_trace: `ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ` makes water an assigned provision, while `كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ` gives each supply-turn a recipient-facing occasion. The bridge is that division operationalizes the act covered by B003: water is deliberately made available to each side. The target therefore contributes administered social provision as well as physical water.
records.negative_evidence: No well, seepage, sky-pouring, fruit, sheen, mirror, coating, reproductive fluid, or dull-heart idiom supports B002 or B004-B008. The water’s division does not itself indicate abundance.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes an allotted share or scheduled turn of water, not merely the act of drinking.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `كُلُّ ... مُّحْتَضَرٌ` makes each share a publicly attended appointment. The drinking allocation is therefore both resource distribution and an observable test of compliance.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000783/B003` (drinkers and co-drinkers) is retained. It adds the social relation around the share: each allotted turn identifies parties who attend and water in relation to one another.
records.activation_trace: `قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ` provides the between-parties construction, and `كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ` provides collective attendance at each turn. Since B003 includes co-drinkers and watering companions, the bridge is that an attended share exists as a socially coordinated drinking occasion. This changes the target from an abstract quota into a quota enacted among present participants.
records.negative_evidence: Water makes drinking implicit, but there is no separately narrated act of imbibing sufficient to retain B001 as a secondary reading. No vessel/place, unpleasant-water quality, permeation, rope, neck extension, understanding, accusation, waterskin treatment, or watered land is visible.

records.primary_reading: The target is literal water characterized as poured out and available among the garden’s provisions.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The following fruit is abundant, neither cut off nor withheld. That negative pair makes the poured water part of an environment defined not only by plenty but by uninterrupted and unobstructed access.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained. Its pouring/supplying image turns the target from a static quantity into provision continuously made available.
records.activation_trace: The passive participle `مَّسْكُوبٍ` is an exact pouring cue for B003, while `لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ` supplies the local image of supply without interruption or withholding. The bridge is that poured water is water presented for use; the branch adds active availability to the noun’s ordinary substance reading.
records.negative_evidence: `كَثِيرَةٍ` modifies fruit, not the water, so it does not independently establish B002’s water-abundance branch. Fruit is named but no ripening, moisture, color, or sheen activates B006. The other branches have no visible local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the actual water regularly consumed by the addressees.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding language of loss and deprivation (لَمُغْرَمُونَ، مَحْرُومُونَ) turns an ordinary drink into a conspicuous mercy, while the following question relocates its source in the clouds and contrasts gratitude with the possibility of bitter salinity.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained: the water is heard not only as a substance but as something actively supplied.
records.activation_trace: The explicit source-question ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ supplies the local action of bringing water down. Because B003 covers supplying or putting water at another's disposal, the descent bridges ordinary water to bestowed provision; مَآءَ therefore carries giver-dependent availability in addition to its material sense.
records.negative_evidence: No cue supports plating, sheen, crystal, heart-dullness, or reproductive fluid. Mere cloud origin does not by itself establish the abundance conditions of B002.

records.primary_reading: The verb denotes the addressees' ordinary act of drinking the water.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Drinking is framed as a contingent privilege: the same water could be made أُجَاجًا, so the familiar act implicitly depends on the drink's present quality.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000783/B005` is retained: the threatened أُجَاجًا activates the branch of unpleasant, saline, or bitter water that may be drunk only with aversion or need.
records.activation_trace: The sequence تَشْرَبُونَ ... جَعَلْنَٰهُ أُجَاجًا places actual drinking against a counterfactual deterioration in taste. B005 supplies the water-quality role; the abductive bridge is that the act remains lexically “drinking” while its ease and desirability can be withdrawn. The target thus contributes grateful, quality-dependent drinking rather than mere ingestion.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing locally marks an allotted turn, a group or place of drinkers, bodily channels, absorption, neck-binding, craning, understanding, or the minor technical and idiomatic branches.

records.primary_reading: The first occurrence denotes the addressees' water supply considered as “your water,” hypothetically sunk beyond reach.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The surrounding alternatives of destruction or mercy and the declaration of reliance make material access to water another test of whom one can actually depend upon.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained through a sharply visible reversal: the branch of water appearing or entering the land is activated by its threatened disappearance into غَوْرًا and by the contrasted مَآءٍ مَّعِينٍ.
records.activation_trace: أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا pictures water going deep, while the second half asks who can bring accessible water. B002 supplies the appearance/access role. The bridge is contrastive: what is possessed as “your water” is not a fixed object but water whose emergence can be reversed. The possessive target consequently becomes precarious and contingent.
records.negative_evidence: The first occurrence is not itself an act of watering or pouring, so B003 is not retained here. No local cue supports B004-B008.

records.primary_reading: The second occurrence denotes accessible, flowing or evident water offered as the answer to the hypothetical loss.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The interrogative فَمَن converts a basic resource into evidence about agency: after water withdraws, its return cannot be assumed.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B003` are retained. B002 makes the water an event of renewed appearance after غَوْرًا; B003 makes it a provision that someone must bring.
records.activation_trace: The contrast غَوْرًا ... مَعِينٍ visibly opposes hidden depth to accessible water, activating B002. The construction فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ explicitly asks for an agent who brings it, activating B003. Together, the branches change the target from an unnamed quantity of water into water re-emerging and being supplied to dependent recipients.
records.negative_evidence: No visible feature activates reproductive fluid, coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes floodwater that rose beyond its ordinary bounds.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same overwhelming water that belongs to the sequence of punitive seizure becomes the medium around a saving act, حَمَلْنَٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ, and then a remembered lesson.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained: طَغَا is an exact local cue for water becoming excessive or abundant.
records.activation_trace: The predicate طَغَا assigns the water surplus, transgressive rise. B002 supplies the role of water appearing or becoming abundant; the bridge is direct rather than thematic. The target therefore contributes not neutral water but water whose increased quantity has become an agent-like historical threshold between destruction and carriage.
records.negative_evidence: Being carried in the vessel does not say that water entered it, and no intentional watering or pouring is stated; B003 is therefore not retained. B004-B008 lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The verb promises that abundant water would be provided to them if they remained straight on the path.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The following لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ makes plentiful provision itself a test, not an uncomplicated sign of approval.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The object مَّآءً غَدَقًا confirms the ordinary provision-of-water reading. It does not visibly introduce an irrigation share or channel, bodily fluid, prayer formula, rain cloud, reed, dyeing, or forced heart-imbuing.
records.negative_evidence: B003 is tempting because abundance could irrigate land, but no land, crop, share, or channel appears. The spiritual context alone is insufficient for B010.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the abundant water promised as provision.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its abundance is expressly made an instrument of testing by لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ, so material plenty bears moral pressure.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` and `root_001458/B003` are retained. B002 intensifies the noun as water in abundance; B003 frames that abundance as intentionally supplied.
records.activation_trace: غَدَقًا visibly supplies B002's abundance role. The causative لَأَسْقَيْنَٰهُم supplies B003's watering/provision role. The bridge joins quantity and agency: this is not merely water but an ample allotment deliberately made available, which sharpens how it can function as a test.
records.negative_evidence: No trigger supports reproductive fluid, plating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the lowly reproductive fluid from which human beings are created.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The next two ayat reverse the apparent insignificance of مَّهِينٍ: the fluid is placed in a secure repository until a known measure, joining humble material to ordered protection and timing.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained alongside the primary reproductive-fluid sense: the sequence activates the branch of putting water into something.
records.activation_trace: The pronoun in فَجَعَلْنَٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ returns directly to the target and gives it a visible placement construction. B003 supplies the role of water intentionally put into a receptacle; the bridge is the immediate anaphoric sequence. The target thus contributes material that is not merely emitted but deliberately emplaced and held.
records.negative_evidence: B002's abundance or seepage is absent, and the secure repository does not activate coating, sheen, crystal, or heart-dullness.

records.primary_reading: The verb states that the addressees were provided fresh water to drink.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The provision appears within a compact inventory of the earth's holding, the living and dead, and lofty stabilizing mountains, then is immediately set against denial.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: مَّآءً فُرَاتًا fixes the act as ordinary provision of drinkable water. The window shows neither an agricultural water-share nor a channel, bodily fluid, prayer, rain cloud, reed, dyeing, or coerced inward absorption.
records.negative_evidence: Earth and mountains supply setting, not evidence for irrigation. No additional س ق ي branch passes the standard.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the fresh, sweet water provided to the addressees.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Freshness is not isolated sensory description; it belongs to the earth's ordered capacity to hold life and death and sustain its inhabitants.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained: the target is explicitly the object of أَسْقَيْنَٰكُم and therefore resonates as supplied water.
records.activation_trace: The construction وَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُم مَّآءً names both supplier, recipients, and supplied substance. B003 contributes the intentional-watering role; the bridge is direct syntactic government. The noun consequently carries the force of provision, not only freshwater substance.
records.negative_evidence: No abundance term activates B002, and no local trigger supports B004-B008.

records.primary_reading: The adjective characterizes the water as fresh and sweet.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its palatability completes the provision: the ayah does not merely mention water's presence but specifies its fitness for human use before rebuking denial.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The immediate head noun مَّآءً securely realizes the ordinary fresh-water branch. Nothing in the window points to a particular river or to a weakening intellect.
records.negative_evidence: Neither `root_001137/B002` nor `root_001137/B003` has a visible local trigger; retaining either would replace evidence with homonymy.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes rainwater sent down from the rain-bearing clouds.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The following purpose sequence, لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا وَجَنَّٰتٍ, extends a downward torrent into the emergence of food, growth, and dense gardens.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained: descent from ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ and the modifier ثَجَّاجًا visibly activate abundant outpouring.
records.activation_trace: أَنزَلْنَا ... مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا presents both origin and heavy flow. B002 supplies the role of water appearing in abundance from the sky; the bridge is exact to the branch inventory. The target therefore carries eventive, fecund abundance rather than denoting rainwater only as matter.
records.negative_evidence: The crop result does not itself say that a person or object was watered, so B003 is not separately retained. B004-B008 have no cues.

records.primary_reading: The adjective depicts the rainwater as pouring forth copiously.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its force is immediately interpreted by what that torrent produces: grain, vegetation, and interwoven gardens rather than destructive flooding.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: مَآءً and أَنزَلْنَا directly anchor the ordinary pouring/outflow sense. Although vegetation follows, there is no meadow defined by descending basins, and no speech setting activates the eloquent-speaker branch.
records.negative_evidence: `root_000195/B002` is single-source and lacks its required basin/meadow image; `root_000195/B003` has no speaking cue. Neither passes the higher burden.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the earth's water, brought forth from it together with its pasture.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The paired possessives مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا bind hidden resource to visible sustenance, while the settled mountains and final مَتَٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَٰمِكُمْ place both within a prepared habitat.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B002` is retained: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا is an exact cue for water appearing from the earth.
records.activation_trace: The verb-preposition sequence makes the earth the source from which its water emerges. B002 contributes the appearance/seepage role; the bridge is the overt خروج construction. The target thus becomes latent water made manifest and usable, not a static possession of the earth.
records.negative_evidence: Pasture and livestock show benefit but not an explicit act of watering, so B003 is not retained. No cue supports B004-B008.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the water poured down as the first stated stage in producing human food.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The command to inspect food unfolds it backward into coordinated acts: emphatic pouring, splitting the earth, and causing grain to grow. The familiar food thus contains an unseen water-to-earth process.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001458/B003` is retained: the doubled صَبَبْنَا ... صَبًّا explicitly activates the branch of supplying water by pouring.
records.activation_trace: Both verb and cognate verbal noun visibly assign forceful, intentional pouring to the target. B003 supplies the role of water being delivered into the productive environment; the bridge is direct lexical construction. The target therefore contributes administered provision at the head of the food sequence, not merely liquid substance.
records.negative_evidence: Growth is a result, but no cue specifically activates the fruit-sheen branch B006. There is also no independent appearance, reproductive, coating, crystal, or heart-water trigger.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the reproductive fluid described as forcefully emitted and as the material from which the human is created.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window moves from every soul being guarded, through examination of its lowly bodily origin, to divine capacity for its return. Origin and return frame the transient fluid within preservation and re-creation.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: دَافِقٍ and يَخْرُجُ clarify the motion of the reproductive fluid and reinforce its ordinary branch; they do not supply the well, land-seepage, sky-rain, or abundance conditions of B002, nor an intentional watering or pouring act for B003.
records.negative_evidence: The reproductive sense already accounts for the local image. رَجْعِهِۦ belongs to a different root and cannot by itself activate another م و ه branch; B005-B008 likewise lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the sea as the body of water that is divided so that Israel is delivered through it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The surrounding sequence places this deliverance between Pharaoh's slaughter of the sons (2:49) and Israel's calf-taking followed by pardon (2:51-52). Passage through the sea therefore belongs to a sequence in which rescue does not eliminate the rescued community's moral exposure.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) is retained. It supplements the sea's ordinary water-body sense with the image of an opened cleft.
records.activation_trace: The exact verbal trigger is `فَرَقْنَا ... ٱلْبَحْرَ`: the sea is visibly separated. The abductive bridge is that separation turns the broad water body into an opened interval, matching B003's cleft image. The target consequently contributes not only the obstacle crossed but the very opening fashioned for rescue.
records.negative_evidence: The sea is vast and the people travel through it, but no separate cue activates B002's transferred breadth or B009's lexical sea-travel/relationship forms. Saltiness, exposure, ground, redness, disease, thirst, and the higher-burden single-source branches have no local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The form is causative: Pharaoh's people are made to drown in the sea while the delivered community looks on.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The drowning immediately reverses the preceding regime's `يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ`: those who imposed lethal violence are themselves subjected to a lethal water-event.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning, then killing more generally) is retained. The primary act of drowning remains intact, while the branch makes its killing function in the sequence explicit.
records.activation_trace: The visible trigger is the juxtaposition of `يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ` (2:49) with `وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ` (2:50). The bridge is a reversal between two modes of imposed killing. B002 therefore makes the target contribute a judicial counterstroke to the prior slaughter, not merely disappearance beneath water.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing in the window points to tear-filled eyes or saturated ground (B003), bow-drawing (B004), field-wide absorption (B005), a drink measure (B006), or an ornamented bridle (B008).

records.primary_reading: The sea identifies the domain whose catch and food are permitted, in contrast with land game while the addressees are in a consecrated state.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The neighboring rules intensify restraint around attainable game, penalties, sanctuary, and final gathering. Within that regulated setting, the sea is presented as a permitted provision rather than as an unbounded exception to accountability.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. The sea remains the source of catch, but its produce is also marked as provision for movement.
records.activation_trace: The local trigger is `مَتَٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِلسَّيَّارَةِ`, especially the explicit travelers `ٱلسَّيَّارَةِ`. The bridge is that food originating in the sea is assigned to people in transit, activating B009's sea-travel role. The target thus contributes a mobile provisioning domain, not only a fishing location.
records.negative_evidence: The land/sea contrast does not by itself establish transferred breadth (B002), and no cleaving, salt, exposed encounter, water-holding ground, bewilderment, disease, heat, belly, or thirst cue appears.

records.primary_reading: The sea is one of the two comprehensive terrestrial domains, paired with land, whose contents are known by God.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window moves from disputed timing and judgment (6:57-58) to knowledge extending from unseen keys and immense domains down to a falling leaf and a hidden grain, then to every deed and appointed death (6:60-61). Scale changes without creating any gap in knowledge.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth) is retained. The sea's ordinary geographic sense remains, while it also bears the role of a vast scope fully contained by divine knowledge.
records.activation_trace: The visible construction is the widening series `مَفَاتِحُ ٱلْغَيْبِ` / `مَا فِى ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ` / leaf / grain / `رَطْبٍ` and `يَابِسٍ`, capped by `إِلَّا فِى كِتَٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ`. The bridge is that the sea occupies the broad-domain position in an exhaustive scale. B002 therefore makes the target contribute the idea that even maximal expanse is bounded within exact knowledge.
records.negative_evidence: Pairing sea with land is not a cleaving, travel, or open-exposure cue. The darkness belongs to the earth's grain and does not activate bewilderment in the sea word; the remaining specialized branches lack visible triggers.

records.primary_reading: The sea is a domain of darkness and peril from which the endangered ask to be rescued, alongside the land.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The promised gratitude of secret, humble prayer is immediately followed by rescue from every distress and then renewed association of partners (6:64). The window exposes a sharp instability between crisis-recognition and post-rescue allegiance.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and fear-struck stupefaction) is retained. It adds an experiential effect to the sea's ordinary peril without replacing the physical sea.
records.activation_trace: The triggers are `ظُلُمَٰتِ ... ٱلْبَحْرِ`, urgent `تَدْعُونَهُۥ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً`, and the generalizing `مِن كُلِّ كَرْبٍ` in 6:64. The bridge is that darkness and distress reduce the occupants to fearful, disoriented supplication, the state named by B008. The target consequently contributes a crisis-space that overwhelms ordinary self-possession and briefly clarifies dependence.
records.negative_evidence: Rescue at sea does not by itself activate B009 sea travel, since no ship, riding, or journey form appears. No local item supports cleaving, saltiness, exposure, ground, bodily wasting, medical heat, belly, or thirst.

records.primary_reading: The sea is a dark navigational domain in which the stars serve as signs of direction, paired with land.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The focus on guidance is framed by successive acts of distinction: life from death, death from life, daybreak from night, and then detailed signs for knowing and understanding. Navigation becomes one instance of a larger pattern of making differences legible.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) is retained. The sea remains water, while the window lets it resonate as a dark expanse opened into an intelligible route.
records.activation_trace: The especially visible cues are the repeated `فَالِقُ` in `فَالِقُ ٱلْحَبِّ وَٱلنَّوَىٰ` (6:95) and `فَالِقُ ٱلْإِصْبَاحِ` (6:96), followed by `فَصَّلْنَا ٱلْءَايَٰتِ` in the focus ayah. The bridge is the repeated image of splitting or distinguishing what was closed or dark. B003 therefore changes the target's contribution from a merely dark sea into a domain across which signs open distinguishable bearings.
records.negative_evidence: Stars used for guidance do not themselves establish B009's lexical sea-travel branch, because no vessel or sea-riding construction occurs. The following rain and vegetation affect the ayah's sign-pattern but do not activate the sea root's ground, salt, thirst, or other specialized branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the major boundary across which Israel is carried after the drowning of the opposing people.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Immediately after rescue, inheritance, and the destruction of Pharaoh's works, the travelers encounter idol-devotees and request a comparable god. Geographic passage is abruptly shown not to guarantee understanding.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and stupefaction, including foolishness) is retained. The physical crossing remains primary, but the sea also marks a transition that exposes continuing cognitive disorientation.
records.activation_trace: The local trigger is Moses' direct diagnosis `إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ`, prompted immediately after `وَجَٰوَزْنَا ... ٱلْبَحْرَ` by the request for an idol. The bridge is that B008's foolish or bewildered state is overtly named as the response displayed on the far side of the sea. The target thus contributes an ironic threshold: they cross the water boundary while remaining mentally confounded.
records.negative_evidence: The prior drowning is an event of another root and does not by itself activate a sea-root branch. `جَٰوَزْنَا` indicates crossing but supplies no explicit cleft, and the wide inherited east-west land is ayah-level context rather than sufficient activation of B002 in this target.

records.primary_reading: The sea locates the village and supplies the fish whose patterned coming becomes the occasion of the Sabbath test.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding command concerning a village is answered by verbal substitution and punishment (7:161-162); here the seaside village is tested through a temporal alternation in access to fish, followed by warning, rescue, and punishment (7:164-165). Place and provision become instruments that disclose response to command.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `حَاضِرَةَ ٱلْبَحْرِ` and the fish's coming on one class of days firmly connect the sea to location and provision, but neither construction supplies the distinctive form or image required for another `root_000086` branch.
records.negative_evidence: `حَاضِرَةَ` does not establish B005's higher-burden idiom of open, unscreened encounter, and `تَأْتِيهِمْ` is scheduled rather than B010's unintended human encounter. The alternation of days is a test pattern, not evidence for cleaving, breadth, travel, saltiness, bewilderment, or the specialized bodily branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the domain through which God conveys people in ships, first under a favorable wind and then amid a surrounding storm.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A transition from tasted mercy and plotting (10:21) to pleasant sailing, terror, sincere prayer, rescue, and renewed transgression (10:22-23) makes changing conditions expose equally rapid changes in human posture.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) and `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and fear-struck stupefaction) are retained. Together they add the sea's roles as a traveled domain and as a setting that overturns composure.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B009`, the triggers are `يُسَيِّرُكُمْ`, `فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ`, and `جَرَيْنَ بِهِم`; the explicit sequence of conveyance, vessel, and sailing activates the travel branch, so the target contributes an avenue of divinely enabled movement. For `root_000086/B008`, the triggers are the violent wind, wave `مِن كُلِّ مَكَانٍ`, the belief `أَنَّهُمْ أُحِيطَ بِهِمْ`, and crisis-prayer; the bridge is that total encirclement produces B008's fear-struck loss of ordinary confidence. The sea consequently also contributes the crisis-space in which easy joy becomes disoriented sincerity.
records.negative_evidence: `مِن كُلِّ مَكَانٍ` describes the wave's arrival but does not independently activate B002's transferred breadth. No exact cue supports the cleft, salt, exposed-place, ground, redness, disease, medical, belly, thirst, or accidental-encounter branches.

records.primary_reading: The wave is the turbulent sea movement that comes upon the ship from every direction and creates the sense of enclosure.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The wave reverses the passengers' joy in the favorable wind and becomes the immediate condition for exclusive prayer; after rescue, that exclusivity disappears into transgression.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The sole accepted inventory branch, `root_001455/B001`, is already the target's ordinary surging-water sense, visibly expressed by `ٱلْمَوْجُ مِن كُلِّ مَكَانٍ` after `رِيحٌ عَاصِفٌ`. It explains the primary turbulence and cannot serve as an additional branch.
records.negative_evidence: The inventory supplies no other `root_001455` branch. The surrounding human agitation and later transgression extend the ayah-level pattern, but they do not license an invented secondary branch.

records.primary_reading: The sea is crossed by Israel and then entered in pursuit by Pharaoh and his forces, where drowning overtakes him.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The accepted prayer for hardened hearts to see punishment (10:88-89) is answered in a scene where Pharaoh voices belief only once drowning reaches him; 10:91 then contrasts that present claim with prior rebellion, while 10:92 preserves his body as a sign.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and fear-struck stupefaction) is retained. It adds the sea's power to produce a fear-driven collapse of Pharaoh's prior posture.
records.activation_trace: The triggers are the pursuit `بَغْيًا وَعَدْوًا`, the sudden limit `حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَدْرَكَهُ ٱلْغَرَقُ`, and the immediately ensuing profession `قَالَ ءَامَنتُ`. The bridge is that being overtaken within the sea converts defiant aggression into the fear-struck state covered by B008. The target therefore contributes the setting that stupefies the pursuer into belated acknowledgment, while remaining the physical sea.
records.negative_evidence: Crossing alone is insufficient for B003 cleaving because no split is stated in this window, and there is no vessel or sea-riding form for B009. The pursuit does not by itself establish B002's transferred breadth or its horse subcase; all other specialized branches lack a local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the drowning that overtakes Pharaoh and brings his pursuit to its terminal point.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Drowning is positioned as the concrete arrival of the punishment requested in 10:88 and the answer confirmed in 10:89, yet the speech it elicits is rejected as belated in 10:91.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) is retained. The event remains literal drowning, while the branch adds its role as an executed lethal judgment.
records.activation_trace: The visible sequence is `ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ` in Moses' prayer, `قَدْ أُجِيبَت دَّعْوَتُكُمَا`, and then `أَدْرَكَهُ ٱلْغَرَقُ`. The abductive bridge is that the drowning realizes the already requested and accepted punishment, fitting B002's killing-by-drowning role. The target consequently contributes not an accidental maritime death but the lethal completion of the answered judgment.
records.negative_evidence: `أَدْرَكَهُ` describes the drowning's arrival but is not enough to assign B005's separate field-absorption uses. No tears or saturated land, bow, drink measure, or ornamented bridle appears.

records.primary_reading: The sea is a subjected water domain yielding fresh food and ornament and carrying ships through which people seek divine bounty.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window aligns the sea with subjected celestial cycles, varied earthly colors, stabilizing mountains, rivers, paths, and guiding marks (16:12-16). The sea's food, adornment, movement, commerce, and demanded gratitude form one part of a coordinated order rather than isolated resources.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) and `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) are retained. The sea remains the abundant water body; the branches add the opened track made by ships and its role as a traveled domain.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B003`, the visible trigger is `ٱلْفُلْكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيهِ`: the ships are presented as cutting their way through the sea. The bridge from that cutting image to B003's wide cleft makes the target contribute a medium visibly opened into tracks of passage. For `root_000086/B009`, `ٱلْفُلْكَ`, movement `فِيهِ`, and `لِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ` jointly activate sea travel; this makes the target contribute a route for seeking bounty as well as a source from which goods are extracted.
records.negative_evidence: Fresh flesh does not activate saltiness, and extraction of ornament does not activate the unrelated decorated-bridle branch of another root. The nearby rivers and paths support the ayah-level order but do not establish the sea root's ground, breadth, exposure, bewilderment, disease, belly, or thirst branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the broad body of water through which God drives ships so that people may seek His bounty; its ordinary contribution is the navigable setting of commerce and provision.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same sequence moves from protected servants and divine trusteeship (17:65), through profitable navigation, to distress at sea and danger even after reaching land (17:67–68). The ship's routine motion is therefore framed as mercy amid a vulnerability that neither sea nor land removes.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. The sea contributes not only a location but the undertaking of sea travel by which bounty is sought under divine care.
records.activation_trace: The visible construction `يُزْجِى لَكُمُ ٱلْفُلْكَ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ لِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِ` names ship movement, a maritime route, and its commercial purpose. These cues activate `root_000086/B009` in the role of practiced sea-going. The abductive bridge is that a sea explicitly traversed by ships for livelihood naturally evokes the root's branch for embarking upon and being related to the sea. This changes `بَحْرِ` from passive scenery into a mercifully enabled field of travel and work.
records.negative_evidence: The following distress sharpens the ayah-level risk but does not itself establish bewilderment in this focus ayah, so `root_000086/B008` is not retained here. No visible cue establishes cleaving, saltiness, exposed-place idiom, disease, thirst, or the remaining branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the place where severe harm reaches travelers, false objects of appeal disappear, and God alone is called upon before rescue to land.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah presents the sea as a route to bounty and mercy, while the following ayat deny that land is finally secure and threaten a return to sea and drowning. Rescue changes location but not human dependence; the striking reversal is the rescued person's immediate turning away.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) and `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and fear-struck daze) are retained. The first makes the crisis a hazard internal to an ongoing maritime undertaking; the second adds the disorienting collapse of ordinary reliance under sea danger.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B009`, `ٱلْفُلْكَ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ` in 17:66 and `يُعِيدَكُمْ فِيهِ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ` in 17:69 visibly place the focus between embarkation and possible re-embarkation. The branch's role is sea-going activity, and the bridge is the travel sequence surrounding the distress; `بَحْرِ` becomes a traveled medium whose benefits and dangers are inseparable. For `root_000086/B008`, the cues are `ٱلضُّرُّ`, the disappearance expressed by `ضَلَّ مَن تَدْعُونَ`, and the threatened `قَاصِفًا` and `فَيُغْرِقَكُم`. The branch's role is experiential disorientation: extreme peril strips away the traveler's normal map of helpers. Thus the sea contributes a crisis of orientation and allegiance, not merely physical danger.
records.negative_evidence: The land/sea contrast does not activate saltiness, cleaving, water-holding ground, or open-exposure idiom. The particularly remote or single-source disease, medical, belly, encounter, and thirst branches have no local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The sea, paired with land, is one of the domains across which God carries humankind as part of their honor, provision, and preference.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Immediately before this statement, the sea can engulf and the land can collapse or be struck; immediately after it, people are summoned, judged, and may be blind to the way. Human dignity is therefore not invulnerability but the gift of being carried through perilous created domains and held answerable for that gift.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. It makes the sea member of the land/sea pair an enacted domain of human transport, not merely a geographic category.
records.activation_trace: The direct cue `وَحَمَلْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ` assigns carriage across the sea, while the preceding `يُعِيدَكُمْ فِيهِ` and `فَيُغْرِقَكُم` keep actual sea-going visible. `root_000086/B009` functions as the travel branch. The bridge is that being carried in the sea is the concrete condition from which the root's sea-travel usage arises. Consequently `بَحْرِ` contributes a bestowed human capacity and relation to the maritime realm, folded into `كَرَّمْنَا`.
records.negative_evidence: `كَثِيرٍ` and repeated preference express comparison and quantity, not the lexical breadth in knowledge, wealth, pasture, speech, or running delimited by `root_000086/B002`; that branch is not retained. No other branch has a visible local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The two seas identify the meeting place Moses resolves to reach, even if he must continue for a long span.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A geographic destination follows ayat about fixed appointments for judgment and destruction (18:58–59), then becomes a place recognizable through a forgotten fish's path rather than by direct human mastery (18:61–62). Determined travel reaches its marker through an event the travelers initially overlook.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) and `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) are retained. The two seas become both the horizon of a sustained journey and a meeting whose water is marked by a passage-like opening.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B009`, `أَبْلُغَ`, `أَمْضِىَ حُقُبًا`, `جَاوَزَا`, and `سَفَرِنَا` form a visible travel sequence directed toward the two seas. The branch's role is maritime destination and relation; the bridge is that persistent journeying to the sea-junction makes `بَحْرَيْنِ` an organizing term of travel, not a static label. For `root_000086/B003`, the adjacent construction `فَٱتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُۥ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا` supplies a path and tunnel-like passage within the water. The branch's role is opening/corridor, and the bridge is that a `سَبِيل` described as `سَرَبًا` visibly presents the sea as admitting a cleft-like route. This adds to the meeting of seas the image of water containing an opened sign-path.
records.negative_evidence: The long duration `حُقُبًا` is temporal persistence, not enough by itself to activate `root_000086/B002` breadth. The journey is deliberate, so the single-source unplanned-encounter branch `root_000086/B010` is not retained; the other branches lack local triggers.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the water into which the forgotten fish takes its path, described as a tunnel or passage.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The travelers reach the intended meeting yet fail to recognize the decisive sign there; only after passing it, feeling fatigue, and recalling the fish does the sea-path become `عَجَبًا`. Arrival and recognition are separated by forgetfulness.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) and `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and stupefaction) are retained. The first makes the water body appear opened into a corridor; the second makes that corridor the object around which forgetfulness turns into astonished recognition.
records.activation_trace: `سَبِيلَهُۥ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا`, repeated in 18:63 as `سَبِيلَهُۥ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ عَجَبًا`, visibly activates `root_000086/B003`: `سَبِيل` plus `سَرَبًا` gives the branch the role of a cleft-like channel. The bridge is the concrete image of a route maintaining itself inside water, so `بَحْرِ` contributes a medium opened into a sign-bearing passage. The same repetition activates `root_000086/B008` through `نَسِيَا`, `أَنسَىٰنِيهُ`, and especially `عَجَبًا`. Its role is cognitive disorientation followed by amazement; the bridge is that the strange sea-path is both missed and then marveled at. The target therefore also marks a disturbance in perception and memory.
records.negative_evidence: `سَفَرِنَا` is a general human journey, while the explicit sea-path belongs to the fish; this is insufficient to add the more specific sea-embarkation branch `root_000086/B009`. No cue supports saltiness, exposed-place idiom, ground, disease, encounter, thirst, or the remaining branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the medium in which the fish takes its extraordinary path, now recalled as an astonishing event.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Forgetting the fish seems like failure, yet remembering its path reverses the travelers onto their traces and leads them to a servant endowed with mercy and special knowledge (18:64–65). The missed sea-sign becomes the guide to what they were seeking.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft), `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and stupefaction), and `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth, including in knowledge) are retained. Respectively, the sea is opened as a strange route, experienced through disoriented wonder, and positioned as the threshold to an enlargement of knowledge.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B003`, `ٱتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُۥ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ`, together with the earlier `سَرَبًا`, is the visible image of a corridor through water. The branch serves as the opening/channel image; the bridge is that a tunnel-like sea-path resembles a cleft maintained in the water, changing `بَحْرِ` into an opened guideway. For `root_000086/B008`, `نَسِيتُ`, `أَنسَىٰنِيهُ`, and `عَجَبًا` explicitly supply disrupted recollection and amazement. The branch serves as the observer's cognitive state, and the sea consequently contributes the startling sign that overturns failed orientation. For `root_000086/B002`, the immediate result of retracing the sea-sign is `وَعَلَّمْنَٰهُ مِن لَّدُنَّا عِلْمًا`; knowledge is an expressly delimited scope of this branch. Its role is epistemic breadth. The bridge is the tight sequence from the remarkable sea-path, to reversed tracks, to encounter with divinely given knowledge; the sea becomes a threshold at which the travelers' field of knowledge is expanded.
records.negative_evidence: Although `فَوَجَدَا عَبْدًا` is a meeting, the window does not say it was an accidental encounter of the special kind delimited by the single-source `root_000086/B010`; it is not retained. No visible trigger supports the remaining branches.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the workplace of poor boat owners whose vessel is deliberately damaged so that a king will not seize it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding demand for payment and declaration of parting give way to an explanation in which an apparent defect protects vulnerable workers. The following explanations maintain the same reversal from visible harm to a concealed merciful purpose.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. Here it contributes an occupational maritime relation: the sea is not background but the workers' sphere of livelihood and exposure to royal seizure.
records.activation_trace: `ٱلسَّفِينَةُ`, `لِمَسَٰكِينَ يَعْمَلُونَ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ`, and the repeated `كُلَّ سَفِينَةٍ` are direct cues of seafaring work. They activate `root_000086/B009` in the role of sustained livelihood and relation to the sea. The bridge is explicit: those who `يَعْمَلُونَ` in the sea necessarily live through the root's sea-going branch. This makes `بَحْرِ` denote the poor owners' economic world, which the damaged vessel preserves.
records.negative_evidence: `أَعِيبَهَا` states a defect but not a cut or cleft, so it does not meet the standard for `root_000086/B003`. Royal seizure creates vulnerability but supplies no formulaic open-exposure expression for `root_000086/B005`. No other branch has a sufficient local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The first sea is imagined as an immense reservoir of ink for writing the words of the speaker's Lord.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding permanent gardens are places their inhabitants never seek to exchange, yet even the apparently immense sea can be exchanged for another like it and still prove finite before God's words. The following ayah then places this immeasurable revelation in the speech of a human messenger who declares one God.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth, including breadth in speech) is retained. It intensifies the first sea as the chosen image of maximal material amplitude set in service of unbounded divine words.
records.activation_trace: The visible cues are `مِدَادًا`, `لِّكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّى`, and the added `بِمِثْلِهِۦ مَدَدًا`. `root_000086/B002` has the role of breadth in verbal expression and supply. The bridge is that the sea's vast physical abundance is converted into writing material precisely to measure `كَلِمَٰت`, while even an equal reinforcement is contemplated. Thus the first `بَحْرُ` contributes not only water volume but the broadest imaginable material capacity for speech, against which the divine words exceed measure.
records.negative_evidence: Ink imagery does not make saltiness, cleaving, sea travel, exposed ground, color/depth, disease, or thirst operative. No other branch is retained.

records.primary_reading: The second sea is the same hypothetical ink reservoir viewed at the point of exhaustion: it would run out before the Lord's words do.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The repeated noun changes function within one sentence, moving from seemingly inexhaustible supply to the exhausted term of comparison. Even duplication by an equal sea cannot close the gap between created quantity and divine words.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth, including breadth in speech) is retained. On this second occurrence, the branch makes maximal breadth itself visibly bounded and exhaustible.
records.activation_trace: `لَنَفِدَ ٱلْبَحْرُ`, contrasted directly with `قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَٰتُ رَبِّى`, and followed by `بِمِثْلِهِۦ مَدَدًا`, activates `root_000086/B002`. Its role is the limit-case of expansive supply and speech. The bridge is the deliberate contest between the sea's proverbial amplitude and the non-exhaustion of `كَلِمَٰت`; the second `بَحْرُ` therefore contributes the collapse of even maximal created breadth before divine expression.
records.negative_evidence: Repetition supplies no trigger for the root's unrelated or higher-burden branches. No secondary branch other than `root_000086/B002` is retained for this occurrence.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the water through which Moses is commanded to make a dry path for the servants' night escape, without fear of pursuit.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding garden rivers reward purification, while this sea becomes dry passage for the faithful and then returns as engulfing water over Pharaoh's forces. One water setting sustains permanence; the other differentiates rescue from destruction through the path God commands.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) and `root_000086/B008` (bewilderment and fear-struck daze) are retained. The first makes the sea an explicitly struck-open corridor; the second is activated by fear language only to be negated for Moses while the pursuing force is overwhelmed.
records.activation_trace: `فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا` visibly activates `root_000086/B003`: striking a dry path within water gives the branch the role of a wide opening. The bridge is direct physical correspondence between a cleft and the path produced inside the sea; `بَحْرِ` becomes an opened escape-way without ceasing to denote the water body. For `root_000086/B008`, the explicit contrast `لَّا تَخَٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ`, followed by the pursuers being covered by `ٱلْيَمِّ`, supplies fear and overwhelming danger. The branch's role is a denied psychological effect for the rescued travelers. The bridge is that the sea would ordinarily induce fear-struck disorientation under pursuit, but the command converts that possible experience into confident passage. The target therefore contributes danger whose bewildering force is suspended for one group.
records.negative_evidence: The dry route is not ordinary embarkation or riding upon water, so `root_000086/B009` is not retained. The adjacent rivers and sea do not by shared water vocabulary activate saltiness or water-holding ground. No other branch has a visible cue.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the navigable water in which ships run by God's command as one instance of creation being subjected for people.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Rain greening the earth, ownership of heaven and earth, ship motion, restraint of the sky, and human life, death, and revival are placed in one sequence. Routine navigation is thus one local expression of the same command that sustains the world's larger order, despite human ingratitude.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. It turns the sea from a named element within creation into the active maritime relation made available to people by divine command.
records.activation_trace: `وَٱلْفُلْكَ تَجْرِى فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ بِأَمْرِهِۦ` directly names ships running in the sea, while `سَخَّرَ لَكُم` states their availability to people. These cues activate `root_000086/B009` in the role of enabled sea-going. The bridge is the exact travel construction: relation to the sea is realized through vessels moving in it. Hence `بَحْرِ` contributes a divinely ordered human capability, not merely the ships' location.
records.negative_evidence: Rain and green earth alter the ayah's larger water-and-life frame but do not activate the root-specific ground branch `root_000086/B006`. The heaven/earth scale is not a lexical cue for `root_000086/B002`, and no other branch passes the evidence standard.

records.primary_reading: The noun supplies the actual deep sea in which the comparison's darkness, waves, and loss of sight occur.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah's thirsty person mistakes a mirage for water and finds nothing; the focus ayah answers absence with overwhelming real water, yet both scenes terminate in failed perception.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth) and `root_000086/B014` (severe unquenched thirst) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B002`, the local stack `بَحْرٍ لُّجِّىٍّ ... مَوْجٌ مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ مَوْجٌ ... سَحَابٌ` supplies depth and repeated vertical extension; breadth therefore acts as the spatial amplifier that turns the sea into an encompassing field of occlusion. For `root_000086/B014`, the immediately preceding `ٱلظَّمْـَٔانُ` who approaches supposed `مَآءً` but `لَمْ يَجِدْهُ شَيْـًٔا` is an unusually explicit trigger for thirst left unquenched; the sea consequently carries an irony of abundance that still cannot give the seeker access or relief.
records.negative_evidence: The darkness and inability to see do not by themselves establish `root_000086/B008` bewilderment, and no local form supports the cleft, salt, travel, disease, or later medical branches.

records.primary_reading: The first wave rises over and covers the person or deep-sea scene.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its role is not merely maritime motion: the following second wave and cloud recruit it into a layered architecture of darkness.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `يَغْشَىٰهُ` and the sequence `مَوْجٌ مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ مَوْجٌ` strongly intensify the accepted turbulence image, but the inventory has no other `م و ج` branch to activate; the cues therefore refine the primary sense only.
records.negative_evidence: No branch ID beyond `root_001455/B001` exists in the supplied target inventory, so the repetition cannot license an invented secondary branch.

records.primary_reading: The second wave is the upper wave, placed above the first and below the cloud.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Repetition converts an individual wave into a recursive layer: water, wave, wave, and cloud make physical turbulence a model for compounded obscurity.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The construction `مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ مَوْجٌ مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ سَحَابٌ` gives the second occurrence its distinct stacking role, but this remains within `root_001455/B001` rather than activating another accepted branch.
records.negative_evidence: No additional `م و ج` branch is present in the inventory; neither darkness nor cloud supplies one.

records.primary_reading: The dual denotes the two bodies of water, one fresh and one intensely salty, brought into relation while a boundary remains between them.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The next ayah's `خَلَقَ مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ بَشَرًا` and `نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا` places the bounded relation of waters beside the making of human relational bonds: contact does not erase distinction.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B004` (saltiness) is retained for the salty member of the dual.
records.activation_trace: The explicit predication `وَهَٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ` is the visible trigger for `root_000086/B004`; saltiness differentiates one referent inside `بَحْرَيْنِ`, so the dual is heard not as two interchangeable expanses but as a paired unity with opposed water qualities.
records.negative_evidence: `بَرْزَخًا وَحِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا` marks a barrier, not the cutting action required for `root_000086/B003`; no adequate cue activates breadth, travel, encounter, thirst, or the high-burden peripheral branches.

records.primary_reading: The adjective identifies the first water as fresh and sweet.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `مَرَجَ` places that sweetness in contact with its saline opposite, while `بَرْزَخًا` and `حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا` show its identity maintained rather than dissolved.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The deictic contrast `هَٰذَا ... وَهَٰذَا` and the boundary sharpen the primary fresh-water quality, but nothing names the proper river or a decline in intellect.
records.negative_evidence: Neither `root_001137/B002` nor `root_001137/B003` has a local trigger; the window supplies no river name and no cognitive weakening.

records.primary_reading: The adjective presents the second water as bitterly, intensely salty.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its harsh quality remains one element of a deliberately held contrast: the two seas are set in relation, yet the repeated demonstratives preserve their different identities.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `مِلْحٌ` directly fixes the target in the accepted saline sense; `مَرَجَ` adds movement or contact at ayah level but supplies no audible rustling, blaze, or heat that would move the target into another `ء ج ج` branch.
records.negative_evidence: `root_000014/B001`, `root_000014/B002`, and `root_000014/B004` are not retained: agitation is not audibly marked, heat is absent, and generic intensity would merely restate the primary salt sense.

records.primary_reading: The accusative noun is the sea struck by Moses' staff.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The pursuers' apparent closure in `إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ` is reversed when the obstructing sea itself becomes separated towering sides and a route of rescue.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft) is retained.
records.activation_trace: The sequence `ٱضْرِب ... ٱلْبَحْرَ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ` visibly supplies strike, splitting, and separated parts; `root_000086/B003` acts as the opening image, changing `ٱلْبَحْرَ` from a body of water acted upon into the very medium cut open for passage.
records.negative_evidence: `كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ` magnifies the resulting parts but does not independently activate the general breadth branch, and no cue supports saltiness, travel, bewilderment, or the peripheral senses.

records.primary_reading: The dual names two bodies of water between which a barrier has been placed.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The sea boundary appears inside a repeated sequence of terrestrial stabilizations: earth as `قَرَارًا`, rivers through it, firm mountains, and finally a barrier between waters.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `حَاجِزًا` gives the two seas a relational limit and the surrounding `أَنْهَٰرًا` broadens the hydrological scene, but neither cue matches another accepted `ب ح ر` branch closely enough to alter the target word itself.
records.negative_evidence: A barrier between seas is not a slit or cutting event for `root_000086/B003`; saltiness is not stated, and breadth, travel, exposure, and the high-burden branches lack specific triggers.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the sea as one of the two domains, with land, whose darknesses require guidance.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The sea is framed not only by darkness but by directed movement: guidance through it and winds sent ahead of mercy turn an obscuring domain into a traversable one.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained.
records.activation_trace: `يَهْدِيكُمْ فِى ظُلُمَٰتِ ... ٱلْبَحْرِ` provides travel requiring direction, and `يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ` supplies its maritime enabling image; `root_000086/B009` therefore makes the sea a route actually crossed under guidance, not merely a water body listed beside land.
records.negative_evidence: Darkness alone does not establish `root_000086/B008` bewilderment, and no local cue supports cleaving, saltiness, unplanned encounter, thirst, or disease.

records.primary_reading: The sea is one of the two comprehensive earthly domains, alongside land, in which corruption has appeared through human action.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The sequence moves from human acquisition (`كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِى ٱلنَّاسِ`) to experienced consequence (`لِيُذِيقَهُم`) and possible return, so the environment becomes a disclosed register of action.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B005` (open exposure) is retained, with its formulaic scope kept narrow.
records.activation_trace: The ayah opens with the exact manifestation cue `ظَهَرَ` and locates what has become manifest `فِى ... ٱلْبَحْرِ`; this unusually visible trigger supplies the open/exposed role of `root_000086/B005`. The bridge is not that sea means exposure ordinarily, but that this sea is the arena in which concealed consequences come into view, changing it from a passive location into a field of disclosure.
records.negative_evidence: The land-sea pairing alone is too broad to activate `root_000086/B002`, while `ٱلْفَسَادُ` and `لِيُذِيقَهُم` do not specifically establish wasting disease or unquenched thirst; no other branch is retained.

records.primary_reading: The singular sea supplies the imagined ink source extended by seven more seas.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Trees become pens and seas become replenishing ink, yet even this enormous conversion of earth's materials remains finite before `كَلِمَٰتُ ٱللَّهِ`.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth) is retained.
records.activation_trace: `يَمُدُّهُۥ` makes the sea an extendable quantity, `سَبْعَةُ أَبْحُرٍ` multiplies it, and `مَا نَفِدَتْ` measures that abundance against inexhaustible words; `root_000086/B002` thus turns the singular sea into a deliberately maximal measure of material vastness whose insufficiency sharpens the comparison.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing in the writing-and-extension construction triggers cleaving, saltiness, sea travel, exposure, thirst, disease, or the other peripheral branches.

records.primary_reading: The plural denotes seven additional seas imagined as replenishing the first sea's ink.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Multiplication does not approach adequacy: even the pluralized reserve is placed under the negated exhaustion of God's words.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B002` (expanse and breadth) is retained.
records.activation_trace: The numeral `سَبْعَةُ`, the support relation `مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ`, and the result `مَا نَفِدَتْ` make breadth an explicit quantitative role; `root_000086/B002` changes `أَبْحُرٍ` from a mere count of water bodies into successive layers of vast provision that still fail as a measure.
records.negative_evidence: The plural form itself does not license travel, salt, cleaving, or relation branches, and the window contains no specific cue for any high-burden sense.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the water body through which the ships run.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The next ayah exposes the same passage as crisis: a wave like canopies prompts exclusive prayer, and rescue to land tests whether seeing the sign becomes acknowledgment.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained.
records.activation_trace: The concrete construction `ٱلْفُلْكَ تَجْرِى فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ` directly depicts sea travel, while `غَشِيَهُم مَّوْجٌ` and `نَجَّىٰهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْبَرِّ` trace its danger and endpoint; `root_000086/B009` therefore changes the sea from static setting into a journey whose movement, peril, and deliverance disclose signs.
records.negative_evidence: The covering wave may imply fear but does not explicitly establish `root_000086/B008` bewilderment; no cleft, salt, exposure, or thirst branch receives a sufficient cue.

records.primary_reading: The dual names two unequal water bodies, one sweet with an easy drink and the other intensely salty.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `وَمَا يَسْتَوِى` establishes qualitative inequality, but `وَمِن كُلٍّ` immediately gives both a shared economy of food, adornment, travel, bounty, and gratitude.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B004` (saltiness) and `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000086/B004`, `وَهَٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ` explicitly marks the saline member, making `ٱلْبَحْرَانِ` an internally contrasted dual rather than a homogeneous pair. For `root_000086/B009`, `وَتَرَى ٱلْفُلْكَ فِيهِ مَوَاخِرَ لِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ` visibly supplies ships moving through the water for gain; the dual seas consequently function not only as substances of different taste but as navigated fields of provision.
records.negative_evidence: The contrast does not supply a cleaving event, and neither shared produce nor the fresh drink specifically activates breadth, exposure, thirst, disease, or the other peripheral branches.

records.primary_reading: The adjective gives the first sea its fresh, sweet water quality.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its sweetness is made bodily accessible by `سَآئِغٌ شَرَابُهُۥ`, yet the following `وَمِن كُلٍّ` prevents drinkability from becoming the only measure of a sea's benefit.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `عَذْبٌ` and `سَآئِغٌ شَرَابُهُۥ` mutually sharpen the ordinary fresh-water sense; no construction points to the named river or to weakening after mental steadiness.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001137/B002` and `root_001137/B003` lack visible local triggers, so neither is retained.

records.primary_reading: The noun is the drink furnished by the fresh sea, characterized as easy to swallow.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The drink appears inside a larger catalogue of provision from both unequal seas, so immediate ingestion is one mode of benefit among food, adornment, navigation, and sought bounty.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The possessive `شَرَابُهُۥ` refers back to `هَٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ`, and `سَآئِغٌ` fixes literal drinkability; the nearby salty contrast does not transfer an unpleasant-water sense onto this explicitly agreeable drink.
records.negative_evidence: `root_000783/B005` is contradicted rather than activated by `سَآئِغٌ`; no allotted share, drinking group, vessel/place, permeation, understanding, or other accepted branch has a specific cue.

records.primary_reading: The adjective marks the second sea as bitterly, intensely salty.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Although it cannot equal the fresh sea in taste, `وَمِن كُلٍّ` includes it in the same productive sequence, so harshness does not entail uselessness.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `مِلْحٌ` anchors the saline branch and the fresh sea's `سَآئِغٌ شَرَابُهُۥ` supplies a precise contrast; the ships `مَوَاخِرَ` add motion to the scene but do not visibly supply the sound or agitation required for another `ء ج ج` branch.
records.negative_evidence: The earlier `عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌ` is too remote and generic to activate `root_000014/B004`, while no fire, heat, blaze, or audible rustling supports `root_000014/B001` or `root_000014/B002`.

records.primary_reading: The noun is the sea in which the sailing vessels move, appearing like great landmarks or mountains.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The following alternatives make the sign depend on controlled motion: the wind may be stilled so the ships remain motionless, or the ships may be destroyed because of what people earned.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained.
records.activation_trace: `ٱلْجَوَارِ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ` is a direct travel image, while `يُسْكِنِ ٱلرِّيحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ` makes their ability not to travel equally visible; `root_000086/B009` therefore turns the sea into a contingent route whose movement depends on wind and whose travelers remain exposed to stoppage or destruction.
records.negative_evidence: `كَٱلْأَعْلَٰمِ` expresses the ships' scale, not the sea's lexical breadth, and the danger in `يُوبِقْهُنَّ` does not specifically trigger bewilderment, disease, thirst, or another `ب ح ر` branch.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the water body that is to be left in its present condition so that the pursuing force can enter the scene of its drowning.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The repeated ترك reverses agency: Moses is told to leave the sea, and the doomed people then leave gardens, springs, crops, and an honored station. The sea is therefore not merely terrain; it is the hinge by which pursuers become dispossessed.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: رَهْوًا and the later عُيُونٍ, زُرُوعٍ, and مَقَامٍ alter the scene around the sea, but none directly activates an accepted non-water branch of ب ح ر strongly enough to change بَحْرَ itself.
records.negative_evidence: The open route might suggest `root_000086/B003` (wide cleft), and the lost estates might suggest `root_000086/B002` or `root_000086/B006`, but the window contains neither a lexical cleaving cue nor an explicit breadth or water-holding-ground construction. Those associations remain scene-level only.

records.primary_reading: The passive causative participle presents the army as people destined to be made to drown.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The verdict precedes its narrated completion: while the army is still following, it is already grammatically classified by its end. The following inventory of what they left makes the drowning a transfer from armed pursuit to complete loss.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: جُندٌ supplies a collective patient and مُّتَّبَعُونَ supplies the pursuit sequence; these intensify the primary drowning prediction without independently cueing another غ ر ق branch.
records.negative_evidence: Collective destruction could loosely evoke `root_001080/B005` (occupying or absorbing a whole field), but neither an exhaustion, total-scope, gaze, breath, nor surpassing construction appears. `root_001080/B002` is not retained as secondary because killing by drowning is already contained in the target's ordinary causative contribution.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the water body made serviceable for people, specifically as the medium in which ships run and through which bounty is sought.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window places this usable sea between failed human acquisitions and allies in 45:10 and the subjection of everything in the heavens and earth in 45:13. Maritime gain is thus recast from autonomous earning into a commanded gift that calls for gratitude and reflection.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B009` (sea travel and relation) is retained. The branch gives the target an operational contribution: بَحْر is not only a body of water but the enabling domain of seafaring.
records.activation_trace: The explicit construction لِتَجْرِىَ ٱلْفُلْكُ فِيهِ is a visible travel cue, while لِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِ gives the voyage its purpose. Because ships are stated to move in the sea, the bridge to the accepted sea-travel branch is direct rather than thematic.
records.negative_evidence: جَمِيعًا and the heaven-earth span may make the scene feel expansive, but that is insufficient to retain `root_000086/B002`; no use of breadth in knowledge, wealth, speech, pasture, or running is assigned to the target itself. The other branches have no local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The target names the sea as an oath-object, qualified by ٱلْمَسْجُورِ and placed in a compact sequence of solemn cosmic images.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The inhabited house, raised roof, and charged sea lead immediately to an unavoidable punishment. A familiar water body is made evidentiary: its extraordinary condition helps certify that what is announced as لَوَٰقِعٌ cannot be دفع.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: ٱلْمَسْجُورِ sharply transforms the sea's state, while لَوَٰقِعٌ and دَافِعٍ transform its rhetorical role. These are strong ayah-level cues but do not visibly instantiate another accepted ب ح ر branch.
records.negative_evidence: Neither saltiness (`root_000086/B004`), cleaving (`root_000086/B003`), nor non-water breadth (`root_000086/B002`) is named. Inferring one merely from an unusual sea-state would replace evidence with possibility.

records.primary_reading: The dual names two seas released so that they meet, while the next ayah states that a barrier between them prevents either from transgressing.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The paired seas echo the paired easts and wests, but they are also personified by meeting and not overstepping. Cosmic duality becomes regulated relation rather than undifferentiated merger.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000086/B010` (unplanned encounter) is retained under its higher evidentiary burden. It overlays the two water bodies with the image of parties brought into encounter, making their meeting, not only their volume, part of what بَحْرَيْنِ contributes.
records.activation_trace: The immediate verb يَلْتَقِيَانِ is an exact visible encounter cue, and مَرَجَ presents the two as released into that meeting rather than as agents shown arranging it. The following بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ and لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ then define the encounter by a boundary. This unusually explicit meeting construction is sufficient to activate the single-source branch.
records.negative_evidence: The paired horizons do not by themselves license `root_000086/B002` (breadth), and the barrier does not say that either sea is cleft, so `root_000086/B003` is not retained.

records.primary_reading: The sea is the medium in which the constructed vessels travel, their scale rendered by comparison with conspicuous mountains or landmarks.
