records.activation_trace: `وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ جَمِيعًا` explicitly marks total inclusion, while `يَسْتَفِزَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ` and `ٱسْكُنُوا۟ ٱلْأَرْضَ` frame a contested field before and after the event. The abductive bridge to B005's whole-scope occupation is the exhaustive removal of Pharaoh's company from that field; the target consequently contributes comprehensive reversal, not merely individual submersion.
records.negative_evidence: No independent killing verb warrants B002. The window contains no tear or saturation cue for B003, bow for B004, draught for B006, or bridle ornament for B008.

records.primary_reading: In Moses' question, the verb construes the hole in the ship as an action liable or intended to cause its people to drown.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The target occurs inside a mistaken inference: a visible breach is immediately read as a monstrous purpose, although the surrounding instructions stress suspended questioning, patience, and awaiting an explanation.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` is retained: Moses hears the prospective drowning as the killing of the ship's people.
records.activation_trace: The purposive construction `خَرَقْتَهَا لِتُغْرِقَ أَهْلَهَا` assigns the threatened result to an agent, and `لَقَدْ جِئْتَ شَيْـًٔا إِمْرًا` registers moral horror at the deed. The bridge to B002 is the accusation's construal of breaching the vessel as deliberate lethal action; this makes the target contribute perceived homicide by drowning, while its primary nautical sense remains.
records.negative_evidence: Because the drowning is only Moses' inferred purpose, the text does not license further extension beyond B002. Nothing activates B003, B004, B005, B006, or B008.

records.primary_reading: The verb reports God's drowning of the people who denied the signs, as the counterpart to saving and supporting Noah and his family.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding verse calls Noah's ordeal `ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ`, so drowning is presented not only as the deniers' end but as the complete release of Noah's household from an immense distress.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B005` is retained: the drowning encompasses the opposing people without remainder.
records.activation_trace: The direct modifier `أَجْمَعِينَ` is an explicit totality trigger. The abductive bridge to B005's whole-scope absorption is that the water-event takes the entire culpable group; the target thus marks exhaustive communal removal and the completeness of Noah's deliverance.
records.negative_evidence: No separate killing expression activates B002. The nearby field and flock belong to the next judicial episode and do not establish watery saturation for B003; B004, B006, and B008 likewise have no local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The participle declares the wrongdoers destined for drowning and grounds the instruction not to address God on their behalf.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same command carefully specifies preservation inside the ark, down to pairs and family exceptions, while declaring another class already doomed; 23:28-29 then turns survival into praise and a request for blessed landing.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `فَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ`, the ark, embarkation, and the following rescue visibly build the literal flood sequence. `سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ` adds decreed certainty, but does not independently activate another غ ر ق branch.
records.negative_evidence: `مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ` concerns complete provisioning of the ark, not whole-scope absorption of those drowned, so B005 is not retained. The target's fatal implication alone does not establish B002, and B003, B004, B006, and B008 have no matching cue.

records.primary_reading: The verb says that Noah's people were drowned after denying the messengers; their fate is then made a sign for humanity.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The people become communicative after their destruction: their drowning is made `ءَايَةً`, then placed among many peoples and examples in 25:38-39. Their end is not only punitive but exemplary.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` is retained: the drowning participates in the window's generalized register of annihilating peoples.
records.activation_trace: The immediately preceding `فَدَمَّرْنَٰهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا` and the following `وَكُلًّا تَبَّرْنَا تَتْبِيرًا` flank the target with emphatic destruction formulas. The abductive bridge to B002's extended use for killing is this coordinated series of modes of destroying peoples; the target contributes both the particular water-death of Noah's people and their place in a broader catalogue of eradication.
records.negative_evidence: The repeated `كُلًّا` distributes treatment across named peoples but does not depict B005's absorption of the drowning event's whole field. No trigger supports B003, B004, B006, or B008.

records.primary_reading: The verb states that, after Moses and his companions were saved, God drowned the others.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The extreme brevity makes sequence and partition decisive: the others are first brought near, Moses and everyone with him are saved, and only then are the others drowned; the event is immediately identified as a sign and followed by the pairing of divine might and mercy.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B005` is retained: the contrasting group labels make the drowning exhaustive of the remaining side.
records.activation_trace: `وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ` explicitly totalizes the saved company, while `ٱلْءَاخَرِينَ` designates the complementary remainder. The bridge to B005's whole-scope absorption is the categorical partition: once the entire first group is rescued, drowning takes the whole other group. The target therefore contributes completeness of separation as well as submersion.
records.negative_evidence: There is no independent killing lexeme for B002 and no local image for tear/land saturation (B003), bow-drawing (B004), a draught (B006), or an ornamented bridle (B008).

records.primary_reading: The causative verb says that, after rescuing Noah and those with him, God drowned the people who remained.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding request to separate the two parties (فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ) is realized spatially: one party is carried in the laden ark, while the complementary party is left to the water. Drowning thus completes a prior act of rescue and separation.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) and `root_001080/B005` (taking over an entire field) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001080/B002`, وَنَجِّنِى and فَأَنجَيْنَٰهُ supply the explicit survival pole, while ٱلْبَاقِينَ supplies its doomed complement; the bridge is that the causative drowning is the lethal disposition of the non-rescued party, so أَغْرَقْنَا contributes judicial killing rather than an accidental sinking. For `root_001080/B005`, the sequence “those with him” followed by the definite ٱلْبَاقِينَ visibly partitions the whole field into rescued group and remainder; the bridge from exhaustive partition to this branch makes the verb remove the entire residual group, adding completeness to the drowning.
records.negative_evidence: The tear/saturated-land, bow-drawing, milk-measure, and ornamented-bridle branches have no local trigger. ٱلْمَشْحُونِ supports the ark scene but is not enough by itself to activate those branches.

records.primary_reading: أَغْرَقْنَا states that one of the enumerated groups was drowned as the consequence of its own offense.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Drowning appears as only one member of a rigorously distributed set of punishments: storm of stones, blast, earth-collapse, and drowning are all governed by فَكُلًّا أَخَذْنَا بِذَنۢبِهِۦ. The water event is thereby read through individualized accountability, not through an undifferentiated catastrophe.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) and `root_001080/B005` (entering, surpassing, or taking over a field) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001080/B002`, أَخَذْنَا بِذَنۢبِهِۦ and the denial of divine ظلم visibly frame every listed event as a punitive taking; the bridge is that drowning functions as a deliberate lethal sentence, sharpening the verb from physical submersion to accountable killing. For `root_001080/B005`, وَمَا كَانُوا۟ سَٰبِقِينَ immediately precedes the list and supplies the branch's explicit “surpassing/outrunning” cue, while فَكُلًّا and repeated وَمِنْهُم map the whole field. The bridge is failed escape from comprehensive seizure: the drowned group cannot outrun the punishment assigned to it, so أَغْرَقْنَا gains a sense of inescapable capture.
records.negative_evidence: No eye/land saturation, milk measure, or decorated bridle is visible. أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِ حَاصِبًا does not name a bow and is insufficient for the specialized bow-drawing branch.

records.primary_reading: In the conditional, God can drown the riders; if that occurs, they have neither a responder to their cry nor rescue.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The created means of carriage in 36:41-42 is immediately exposed as contingent rather than self-securing. The exception إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا makes every continued voyage and temporary enjoyment an enacted mercy against the still-possible drowning.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) is retained.
records.activation_trace: فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ explicitly removes both aid and rescue, and إِلَّا رَحْمَةً supplies the sole contrary outcome. The abductive bridge is that an unrescued causative drowning terminates life, activating `root_001080/B002`; this makes نُغْرِقْ a potential lethal taking whose suspension defines present transport as mercy.
records.negative_evidence: The full ark (ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ) is a scene cue, not adequate evidence for saturation, whole-field absorption, bow-drawing, milk, or bridle ornament. No other branch passes the standard.

records.primary_reading: God then drowned the others, in contrast to the faithful servant just commended.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The terse drowning clause is enclosed by moral and genealogical continuity: reward for the doers of good and the believing servant precedes it, while Abraham's affiliation and sound heart follow it. The flood boundary therefore also separates two continuing human alignments.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) is retained.
records.activation_trace: نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ, عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ, and the contrasting object ٱلْءَاخَرِينَ visibly divide the rewarded faithful from the drowned others. The bridge is that drowning is the lethal counterpart within this discriminating outcome, so `root_001080/B002` makes أَغْرَقْنَا register as a terminal judgment, not merely a report about water.
records.negative_evidence: ٱلْءَاخَرِينَ identifies the other party but does not by itself establish total absorption under B005. No saturation, bow, milk, or ornament cue appears; no further branch is retained.

records.primary_reading: The verse states that God took vengeance on the people by drowning them all after they provoked wrath.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Their collective obedience to Pharaoh (فَأَطَاعُوهُ) becomes collective destruction (أَجْمَعِينَ), after which the same group is converted into a precedent and example for later people. The social mechanism of following is thus preserved, but reversed into warning.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) and `root_001080/B005` (occupying or absorbing the whole scope) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001080/B002`, ٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ is the explicit local trigger: the causative drowning is the means of punitive killing, which makes the target verb an execution of vengeance rather than neutral submersion. For `root_001080/B005`, the immediately postposed أَجْمَعِينَ is an unambiguous totality marker. The bridge from “all together” to whole-scope absorption makes the drowning exhaustive, removing the obedient collective as a collective and preparing its conversion into سَلَفًا وَمَثَلًا.
records.negative_evidence: The gold bracelets are ornament, but the specialized B008 branch requires an ornament-covered bridle; neither a bridle nor a covering construction is present. Sorrow/wrath in ءَاسَفُونَا does not establish tear-filled eyes, and the bow and milk branches are untriggered.

records.primary_reading: Because of their offenses, the people were drowned, then admitted into fire, and found no helpers apart from God.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The immediate sequence from drowning to entry into fire prevents water from being read as an isolated natural endpoint. It is the first stage of a continuous punitive passage, while the absence of helpers answers the people's earlier insistence on retaining their gods.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B002` (killing by drowning) and `root_001080/B005` (whole-scope absorption) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001080/B002`, the causal مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمْ, passive sequence أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟, and absence of أَنصَارًا visibly make the drowning a punitive death leading directly onward; this activates the killing branch and gives the passive verb the force of a sentence carried out. For `root_001080/B005`, the following prayer لَا تَذَرْ ... مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا explicitly asks that not one inhabitant remain, with 71:27 explaining the danger of leaving them. The bridge is exhaustive removal, so the drowning is heard as taking the corrupt field without residue.
records.negative_evidence: Entry into fire does not supply a bow, and no tears, saturated land, milk measure, or ornamented bridle is visible. Those branches are not retained.

records.primary_reading: غَرْقًا adverbially intensifies ٱلنَّٰزِعَٰتِ: the pull is performed deeply, forcefully, or to the utmost, while the verse leaves the object unstated.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The three clipped parallel clauses move from pulling, to loosening, to swimming, each reinforced by a cognate-style accusative. The local sequence makes the first act one extreme mode within a patterned field of motion rather than a free-standing image.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001080/B004` (drawing a bow to its limit) and `root_001080/B001` (drowning or sinking in water) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001080/B004`, the governing participle ٱلنَّٰزِعَٰتِ supplies the exact pulling/drawing action, while غَرْقًا marks its limit. The abductive bridge is the fully tensioned bow-draw: this gives the otherwise abstract intensity a concrete image of extension to the utmost. For `root_001080/B001`, وَٱلسَّٰبِحَٰتِ سَبْحًا two verses later supplies an explicit swimming image within the same parallel sequence. Swimming and drowning are opposed water outcomes; that contrast lets غَرْقًا carry submersive depth alongside force, changing the pull into one that penetrates or engulfs completely without replacing its primary adverbial role.
records.negative_evidence: The sequence does not visibly cue tears or saturated soil, killing by drowning, a milk measure, or an ornamented bridle. General intensity alone is insufficient for B005, so it is not retained.

records.primary_reading: ٱلْحَمِيمُ is scalding water poured from above the unbelievers' heads, paired with garments cut from fire.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding universal prostration and promised separation on the Day of Resurrection narrow into a bodily scene: a cosmic dispute is resolved upon heads, bellies, and skins. The hot water carries judgment from the level of groups into and across the body.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000001/B003` (rendering fat or suet) and `root_000001/B006` (a matter becoming due, present, or binding) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000001/B003`, يُصْهَرُ بِهِۦ with بُطُونِهِمْ and ٱلْجُلُودُ is a visible rendering/melting process applied to bodies. The bridge is that the hot liquid performs on bodily material what heat does in rendering, so ٱلْحَمِيمُ becomes an active solvent of interior and exterior rather than merely a painful pour. For `root_000001/B006`, وَكَثِيرٌ حَقَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْعَذَابُ states immediately beforehand that punishment has become binding/due, and يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ supplies its appointed arrival. This activates the due/imminent branch and makes the poured water the concrete arrival of an obligation already fixed upon its recipients.
records.negative_evidence: Fire and melting do not explicitly supply charcoal, soot, sweat, fever, or a bathhouse vessel. No horse sound, deliberate pursuit, intimate kin, bird, or choice-property cue appears. The fate branch B010 overlaps conceptually with due punishment, but the wording حَقَّ عَلَيْهِ more exactly supports B006, so B010 is not separately retained.

records.primary_reading: After eating and filling their bellies from the tree, they receive an admixture of scalding water upon it.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The water is not presented as relief after eating but as شَوْبًا, an added mixture that completes the meal before the eaters are returned to the blaze. Drinking is folded into the same coercive consumption as eating.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000001/B011` (near kin or intimate companion) is retained.
records.activation_trace: The closing verse إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ gives an explicit near-kin trigger, ءَابَآءَهُمْ, and makes following those fathers the local explanation for the depicted destination. The abductive bridge is ironic companionship: the ancestral closeness they followed accompanies them into the same return, so `root_000001/B011` makes حَمِيمٍ resonate not only as their drink but as the bitter “intimate” attached to inherited error.
records.negative_evidence: Food, mixture, and filled bellies do not identify rendered fat, and ٱلْجَحِيمِ alone is too broad to establish the separate sweat/summer-heat or fever branches. No blackness, due-time, horse sound, pursuit, bird, bathhouse, or property cue passes the standard.

records.primary_reading: The command makes the inhabitants taste scalding water together with غَسَّاقٌ as named punishments.
records.ayah_level_surprise: حَمِيمٌ is placed in an open-ended taxonomy: it is paired with غَسَّاقٌ, followed by “others of its kind, in pairs,” and then encountered by another entering company. The liquid is one repeatable member of an ordered infernal assortment, not a solitary image.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000001/B001` (blackness, charcoal, or dark smoke) and `root_000001/B004` (intense heat and its effects) are retained.
records.activation_trace: For `root_000001/B001`, the direct coordination وَغَسَّاقٌ supplies a darkening root cue (غ س ق), and مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجٌ explicitly groups similar paired kinds. The bridge is chromatic association within the pair: the scalding liquid is heard as belonging to a dark, smoke-blackened register as well as being hot. For `root_000001/B004`, جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا before the focus and صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ after it visibly enclose the drink in sustained fire exposure. This turns the heat of حَمِيمٌ from a property of one liquid into part of an all-surrounding thermal punishment.
records.negative_evidence: Tasting does not establish rendered fat or fever, and the entering فوج “with you” denotes shared location rather than intimate kinship. No due-time, horse sound, pursuit, bird, bathhouse vessel, or choice-property trigger appears.

records.primary_reading: The noun contributes scalding water as the medium into which the chained deniers are dragged before being subjected to the fire.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The sequence `فِى ٱلْحَمِيمِ ثُمَّ فِى ٱلنَّارِ` makes the liquid no relief from fire: immersion precedes further burning, while the preceding chains and dragging make the water part of a coercive process.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `ٱلنَّارِ` and `يُسْجَرُونَ` intensify the primary heat reading, but neither supplies charcoal, smoke, rendering, kinship, fate, or another branch-specific image of ح م م.
records.negative_evidence: Fire alone is insufficient to retain root_000001/B001, since the window never presents blackness, charcoal, ash, or smoke. The remaining branches likewise lack a visible local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The word supplies boiling hot water as the comparison by which the food's boiling in the bellies is measured.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The comparison expands into a bodily sequence across the window: internal boiling is followed by dragging to the blaze and then hot water poured over the head.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ`, `ٱلْجَحِيمِ`, and `صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ` reinforce boiling, bodily exposure, and punitive pouring, all within the primary hot-water contribution.
records.negative_evidence: `طَعَام` and `كَٱلْمُهْلِ` do not explicitly identify rendered fat, so root_000001/B003 is not retained. Pouring over the head does not by itself establish the bathhouse or heating vessel of root_000001/B013.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes the scalding water whose punishment is to be poured over the condemned person's head.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window joins three modes of forced contact: boiling within the belly, being hauled into the blaze, and an overhead pouring that turns a normally water-bearing gesture into torment.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ` makes the hot water body-directed, while `ذُقْ` adds compelled tasting; these alter the scene of punishment without visibly naming another ح م م branch.
records.negative_evidence: The overhead pour can suggest washing, but no bathhouse or heating vessel appears, so root_000001/B013 does not pass. Nor do blackness, kinship, imminence, fate, or the other inventory images receive a local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The noun contributes intensely hot water as one of the two stations between which the criminals circulate.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ` makes the water not a single encounter but one pole of repeated movement, contrasted immediately afterward with the gardens promised to one who fears standing before his Lord.
records.water_root_resonance: root_000001/B006 (nearness, arrival, or becoming due) is retained. Its role is to make the water's heat feel as though it has arrived at its appointed, fully present condition, supplementing rather than replacing the hot-water sense.
records.activation_trace: The immediately adjacent modifier `ءَانٍ` supplies the trigger: its image of a condition having come due or reached its time closely matches B006's arrival and due-time scope. The abductive bridge is the tight noun-modifier construction `حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ`; thus the water is read not merely as hot but as heat brought to its culminating point.
records.negative_evidence: The window gives no comparably direct cue for charcoal or smoke, rendered fat, kinship, fate, a bathhouse, or the other ح م م branches.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes scalding water as part of the condition surrounding the companions of the left.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The following `ظِلٍّ` initially offers the shape of shelter, but `مِّن يَحْمُومٍ لَّا بَارِدٍ` reverses that expectation: water, wind, and shade all fail to cool.
records.water_root_resonance: root_000001/B001 (blackness, charcoal, and dark smoke) and root_000001/B004 (heat and its bodily or environmental effects) are retained. B001 darkens the hot-water image by coupling it with smoke-like black shade; B004 extends the word's heat from the liquid itself into the surrounding atmosphere and bodily exposure.
records.activation_trace: For B001, the explicit same-root form `يَحْمُومٍ` occurs in `ظِلٍّ مِّن يَحْمُومٍ`, directly realizing the branch's black smoke image; the bridge is that the target's heat belongs to the same enveloping scene as this dark false shade. For B004, `سَمُومٍ` coordinated with `حَمِيمٍ` and the denial `لَّا بَارِدٍ` visibly frame environmental heat and failed cooling; the bridge carries the target from a hot liquid to one element of total heat exposure.
records.negative_evidence: The exact B001 form and the heat/cold contrast support only those two branches. No local cue establishes rendering, kinship, fate, bathing equipment, or the remaining inventory senses.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes hot water presented as the allotted reception for the denying and straying group.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `نُزُلٌ` casts the scalding water in the form of hospitality, while the preceding `سَلَٰمٌ` for the companions of the right and the following `تَصْلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ` expose the punitive inversion.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `نُزُلٌ` changes the rhetorical role of the primary liquid into an offered reception, and the contrast with `سَلَٰمٌ` sharpens that irony. Neither cue, however, realizes another ح م م branch.
records.negative_evidence: Hospitality alone does not establish the near-kin or intimate-friend sense of root_000001/B011, because no relation or affection is present. The blaze and certainty language also do not specifically activate blackness, fate, or another branch.

records.primary_reading: The word supplies scalding water as one of the only drinks available in the place described.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The exception construction `لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا إِلَّا` makes what is grammatically admitted as drink negate both refreshment and coolness; `جَزَآءً وِفَاقًا` then frames it as fitting recompense.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `بَرْدًا`, `شَرَابًا`, `يَذُوقُونَ`, and the exception visibly reshape the primary water image into anti-refreshment. `جَزَآءً` and `حِسَابًا` add a recompense frame at the ayah level.
records.negative_evidence: Negated coolness reinforces hotness but does not independently activate the sweat or summer-effects branch root_000001/B004. Recompense and reckoning are not explicit fate or death cues sufficient for root_000001/B010; all other branches are likewise untriggered.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes ordinary rain whose harmful effects can justify temporarily putting down weapons.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Rain enters a tightly ordered prayer-and-defense procedure as a bodily impediment alongside illness, yet the permission it occasions is immediately bounded by `وَخُذُوا۟ حِذْرَكُمْ` because the enemy seeks one concentrated attack.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001431/B003 (exposure to rain or open exposure) and root_001431/B005 (going off across the land) are retained. B003 makes rain an exposure condition affecting bodies and equipment; B005 locates that weather hazard within sustained movement away from home and across land.
records.activation_trace: For B003, the explicit construction `أَذًى مِّن مَّطَرٍ`, paired with arms, vigilance, and illness, visibly presents harmful exposure; the bridge is that rain matters here through contact with people standing in an exposed defensive setting. For B005, `يُهَاجِرْ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ`, `يَخْرُجْ مِنۢ بَيْتِهِۦ`, `ضَرَبْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ`, and `ٱبْتِغَآءِ ٱلْقَوْمِ` repeatedly mark departure and land travel; the bridge makes the target weather a hazard intrinsic to going out across the land rather than an isolated shower.
records.negative_evidence: The enemy's `مَيْلَةً وَٰحِدَةً` is an attack, but no horse, rider, bird, racing, or other branch-specific motion cue warrants root_001431/B006. No rain garment, waterskin, silence, or fixed-habit image appears.

retained_branches.image_ar: تعرض للمطر أو انكشاف لما يهجم

records.primary_reading: The causative verb presents the shower as deliberately sent down upon the people in punishment.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding rescue of one household except the wife makes the shower discriminate within the narrative sequence, and `فَٱنظُرْ ... عَٰقِبَةُ` turns the event into an outcome to be inspected.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001431/B001 (rainwater pouring from sky or cloud) is retained. It preserves the material shower beneath the verb's punitive causation, so the punishment is imagined as an actual rain-pattern descent rather than only an abstract calamity.
records.activation_trace: The verb takes the explicit same-root object `مَّطَرًا` in `أَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا`. That cognate-object construction is the visible trigger for B001; the abductive bridge is that naming the shower itself foregrounds the ordinary physical rain pattern inside the causative punishment sense.
records.negative_evidence: `أَخْرِجُوهُم مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ` supplies expulsion language, but it does not establish the independent land-ranging motion of root_001431/B005. No specific cue supports exposure, rain-seeking, racing, a garment, or the higher-burden isolated senses.

records.primary_reading: The noun names the descending shower that functions here as punishment upon the criminals.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same rescue-and-exception sequence makes this rain an instrument with a sharply selective narrative outcome rather than a general weather event.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001431/B002 (rainfall sent as punishment) is retained. It assigns the noun an explicitly punitive role, changing `مَّطَرًا` from bare precipitation into a shower whose manner and consequence are chastisement.
records.activation_trace: The immediately governing same-root form-IV verb `أَمْطَرْنَا`, the directional `عَلَيْهِم`, and the result `عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ` jointly trigger B002. The abductive bridge is that causative sending upon identified criminals specifies why this otherwise rain-denoting noun falls.
records.negative_evidence: Being rained upon is inherent in the primary event and is not enough by itself to retain the separate exposure branch root_001431/B003. The window lacks branch-specific cues for seeking, racing, a waterskin, silence, habit, or a rain garment.

records.primary_reading: The imperative asks God to rain stones upon the speakers as painful punishment if the recited message is true.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Their challenge converts claimed certainty into a self-directed demand for proof by destruction; the next ayah answers by naming conditions under which punishment is withheld.
records.water_root_resonance: root_001431/B001 (rainwater pouring from sky or cloud) and root_001431/B004 (seeking rain or rainlike good) are retained. B001 supplies the physical template by which stones are imagined descending like rain; B004 turns the utterance into a perverse rain-invocation that petitions for harm instead of benefit.
records.activation_trace: For B001, `عَلَيْنَا حِجَارَةً مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ` visibly preserves the downward source, recipients, and shower construction while replacing water with stones; the bridge is analogical material descent. For B004, the vocative-request sequence `ٱللَّهُمَّ ... فَأَمْطِرْ عَلَيْنَا` directly addresses God and asks for the shower; the branch's rain-seeking role is activated, but `حِجَارَةً` and `عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ` invert the expected sought good into demanded punishment.
records.negative_evidence: The surrounding plotting, killing, expulsion, and barring from the sanctuary do not specifically realize land-ranging or swift racing branches. The isolated fragrance, waterskin, silence, and fixed-habit senses have no local trigger.

records.primary_reading: The causative verb presents stones of baked clay as a punitive downpour upon the overturned settlement.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window joins two inversions: the town's upper part is made its lower part, while ordered stones descend from above. The preceding promise that the assault will not reach Lot is followed by a warning that the same marked punishment is not far from other wrongdoers.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The night departure in `فَأَسْرِ` and the preposition `عَلَيْهَا` supply movement and exposure imagery, but neither creates a sufficiently word-local bridge from this punitive raining to another م ط ر branch.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001431/B002` is the primary punishment sense, not a secondary resonance. No explicit seeking, racing, garment, waterskin, silence, scent, or fixed-habit cue supports `root_001431/B003`–`B011`; the bare descending image does not independently activate ordinary water-rain `root_001431/B001`.

records.primary_reading: The verb depicts the sending of stones upon the people as a rain of punishment.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The stone-rain follows the dawn cry and the town's vertical reversal, then becomes a readable sign beside an enduring road rather than only a past destructive event.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `بِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ` makes the ruined place a lasting roadside sign, but a road's presence alone does not visibly enact the going-off-across-land sense of `root_001431/B005` in the target word.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001431/B002` supplies the primary punishment sense. The window has no qualifying cue for ordinary beneficial rain, exposure, seeking, swift racing, protective clothing, scent, waterskin filling, silence, or fixed habit.

records.primary_reading: The passive verb says that the settlement was subjected to a punitive raining, specified immediately as `مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ`.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The destroyed settlement is not remote: the people have actually come upon it and can see it, yet their lack of expectation of resurrection prevents sight from becoming recognition.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B005` (going off across the land) is retained. It turns the passive catastrophe into a fixed encounter on a human route: the place that received the rain is now reached by later travelers.
records.activation_trace: `أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ` is the visible travel construction, reinforced by `سَبِيلًا` in 25:42 → it activates `root_001431/B005` → the abductive bridge is that movement through the land brings the observers directly across the rain-marked site → `أُمْطِرَتْ` contributes not only a past event but a punishment made available as encountered route-evidence.
records.negative_evidence: Ordinary rain `root_001431/B001` remains only the lexical precipitation image beneath the primary `root_001431/B002`; no local water or fertility contrast activates it independently. No cue meets the burden for `root_001431/B003`, `B004`, or `B006`–`B011`.

records.primary_reading: The cognate accusative names and intensifies the punitive downpour, with `ٱلسَّوْءِ` fixing its evil character.
records.ayah_level_surprise: What fell once remains visually present to passersby; the failure lies not in absence of evidence but in seeing without expecting renewed life.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B005` (going off across the land) is retained. It gives this named evil rain an afterlife as a landmark met in travel.
records.activation_trace: `أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ` and the later `سَبِيلًا` visibly frame travel → they activate `root_001431/B005` → because travelers come upon the very settlement characterized by `مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ`, motion across land becomes the means by which that rain should be read → the noun now denotes both the falling punishment and its route-borne testimony.
records.negative_evidence: The modifier `ٱلسَّوْءِ` establishes primary `root_001431/B002`, but does not by itself activate ordinary rain `root_001431/B001`. There is no adequate local trigger for exposure, rain-seeking, racing, garment, scent, waterskin, silence, or fixed-habit branches.

records.primary_reading: The verb states that a punitive rain was sent upon those left for destruction.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The event is framed between destruction and a sign, while the following pairing of the Lord as mighty and merciful keeps rescue and punishment in the same immediate horizon.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The repetition `أَمْطَرْنَا ... مَّطَرًا ... مَطَرُ` intensifies and evaluates the same punitive event; repetition is not a visible trigger for a distinct root branch.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001431/B002` is primary. Neither the rescued exception nor the divine attributes visibly activate ordinary rain, exposure, seeking, terrestrial movement, racing, garment, scent, waterskin, silence, or fixed habit.

records.primary_reading: The indefinite cognate noun supplies the substance/event rained upon them and intensifies the preceding verb.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Its initially unqualified form is immediately judged by `فَسَآءَ`, so the sequence makes evaluation arrive after the compact image of a downpour.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The verb–noun repetition provides emphasis, and `فَسَآءَ` supplies explicit moral evaluation, but neither bridges the noun to another accepted م ط ر branch.
records.negative_evidence: The punishment branch `root_001431/B002` governs the primary reading. No distinct local trigger supports `root_001431/B001` or `B003`–`B011`.

records.primary_reading: In `مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ`, the noun identifies the downpour as the dreadful rain belonging to a warned people.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The construction retrospectively classifies the event: warning becomes a concrete, completed rain and then an ayah for later hearers.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: `ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ` visibly ties the rain to prior warning and confirms punishment, but it supplies no route from the target to a separate branch of م ط ر.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001431/B002` is primary. The window lacks qualifying cues for `root_001431/B001` and `B003`–`B011`.

records.primary_reading: The verb denotes the sending of a punitive downpour upon the warned community.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Two ayat later, descent from the sky produces water, gardens, and delight. The window therefore places destructive and life-producing descent in sharp proximity.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B001` (rainwater pouring from sky or cloud) is retained. It makes the punitive verb an inversion of the familiar life-giving descent rather than an isolated mode of destruction.
records.activation_trace: `وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ` is an explicit sky-water-and-growth image → it activates `root_001431/B001` → the same downward pattern can carry either stones/punishment or water/growth → `أَمْطَرْنَا` gains a pointed reversal of rain's ordinary beneficence.
records.negative_evidence: `root_001431/B002` remains primary. The window offers no adequate trigger for exposure, seeking, land travel, racing, clothing, scent, waterskin, silence, or fixed habit.

records.primary_reading: The cognate noun intensifies and concretizes the punishment sent upon them.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The nearby beneficial `مَآءً` makes the unmodified noun momentarily carry the physical shape of ordinary rain before `فَسَآءَ` condemns it.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B001` (ordinary descending rainwater) is retained. It sharpens `مَّطَرًا` as a corrupted counterpart to the sky-water that produces delightful gardens.
records.activation_trace: The visible sequence `مَّطَرًا` ... `أَنزَلَ ... مَآءً` ... `فَأَنۢبَتْنَا` → activates `root_001431/B001` → both are descending gifts of form, but their effects diverge into ruin and growth → the target noun carries an inverted-fertility dimension alongside its primary punishment sense.
records.negative_evidence: No local construction activates `root_001431/B003`–`B011`; purity in 27:56 is a description of people and does not support a rain-root branch.

records.primary_reading: The noun in `مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ` evaluates the event as the terrible rain of those who had been warned.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The condemnation is followed by praise, peace upon chosen servants, and then fertile sky-water, making the warned people's rain the negative member of a wider contrast in divine giving and judgment.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B001` (rainwater pouring from sky or cloud) is retained. It makes the evaluated `مَطَرُ` contrast directly with the beneficial descent named in 27:60.
records.activation_trace: `أَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً` and the resulting gardens are visible local triggers → they activate `root_001431/B001` → ordinary rain's productive effect provides the comparison suppressed inside `فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ` → the target becomes specifically bad rain against a locally displayed good-rain pattern.
records.negative_evidence: Apart from primary `root_001431/B002` and retained `B001`, the window gives no qualifying evidence for `root_001431/B003`–`B011`.

records.primary_reading: In the people's speech, the active participle identifies the approaching cloud as one that will rain upon them, an expected source of water for their valleys.
records.ayah_level_surprise: `بَلْ` immediately overturns their visual interpretation: what faces their valleys is not the hoped-for rain cloud but the very thing they demanded, a wind containing painful punishment that leaves only dwellings visible.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001431/B002` (rainfall sent as punishment) is retained. It converts the speakers' expected benefaction into an ironic misrecognition of approaching chastisement while preserving their ordinary rain reading as the utterance's starting point.
records.activation_trace: `بَلْ هُوَ مَا ٱسْتَعْجَلْتُم بِهِۦ رِيحٌ فِيهَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ`, followed by `تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ`, is the explicit correction → it activates `root_001431/B002` → the same visible cloud-form can be abductively read under the punitive branch once its contents and effect are disclosed → `مُّمْطِرُنَا` becomes tragic irony, naming desired rain at the instant punishment arrives.
records.negative_evidence: No branch beyond primary ordinary rain `root_001431/B001` and retained punishment `B002` has a qualifying trigger. `مُسْتَقْبِلَ أَوْدِيَتِهِمْ` is spatial approach, not enough for the unrelated going/racing branches, and no seeking form, protective object, waterskin, silence, scent, or fixed habit appears.

records.primary_reading: The noun names the great body of water into which Moses, enclosed in the chest, is to be cast.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A sequence that appears to abandon the infant instead moves him under command from chest to water to shore and into the enemy's hands, all within the declared purpose of love, watchfulness, and formation.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. Despite the inventory's noted separation of the sea homonym, the repeated directed commands make this sea a deliberately chosen course rather than an undirected danger.
records.activation_trace: `ٱقْذِفِيهِ ... فَٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ` supplies repeated imperatives with an explicit destination → it activates `root_001697/B001` → the sea is the aimed-at middle point in a commanded chain whose endpoint is the shore and divine formation → `يَمِّ` contributes a directed providential route alongside its primary water sense.
records.negative_evidence: The high-burden homonymous bridge is accepted only for `B001` because direction is overt. No dust, wiping, or prayer supports `root_001697/B002`, and no bird or proper-name cue supports `B004` or `B005`; `root_001697/B003` is primary.

records.primary_reading: As grammatical subject, the sea is commanded to cast the chest onto the shore.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The body of water behaves as an obedient carrier: what receives the vulnerable child also delivers him precisely to a shore within a larger protective design.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. The sea's agency is represented as target-directed, with `بِٱلسَّاحِلِ` naming the endpoint.
records.activation_trace: `فَلْيُلْقِهِ ٱلْيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ` is an imperative-like sequence assigning the sea a destination, reinforced by `وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ` → it activates `root_001697/B001` → the commanded endpoint bridges the unrelated intent branch to the sea's narrated action → `يَمُّ` becomes an instrument of precise conveyance, not merely surrounding water.
records.negative_evidence: No ritual-earth, bird, or place-name signal supports `root_001697/B002`, `B004`, or `B005`. The sea branch `root_001697/B003` is the primary sense.

records.primary_reading: The noun names the sea whose waters overwhelmed Pharaoh and his forces.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The same sea-area contains a dry path for the rescued people and an engulfing mass for their pursuers; Pharaoh's act of leading is then explicitly judged as misguidance rather than guidance.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming or directing oneself toward something) is retained. The pursuit is intentional, but its chosen course is exposed as misdirection when it ends in the sea's covering.
records.activation_trace: `فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ` is deliberate pursuit, while `وَأَضَلَّ ... وَمَا هَدَىٰ` explicitly evaluates direction → together they activate `root_001697/B001` → the pursuer aims after Moses along a path but is not truly guided → `ٱلْيَمِّ` becomes the terminal disclosure of a wrongly aimed course as well as the overwhelming water.
records.negative_evidence: The dry path `يَبَسًا` lacks dust, face/hand wiping, and prayer, so it does not meet the burden for ritual `root_001697/B002`. No bird or proper-name cue supports `B004` or `B005`; `B003` is primary.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the great water into which the burned idol's remains will be scattered.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The object of sustained devotion is reduced through an emphatic two-stage sequence, burning and then complete dispersal; immediately afterward, comprehensive knowledge replaces the destroyed object as the defining divine attribute.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. The sea is the expressly selected endpoint of a planned, emphatic act of eradication.
records.activation_trace: `لَنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا` visibly supplies intention, sequence, emphasis, and destination → it activates `root_001697/B001` → the sea is deliberately aimed at as the place that prevents the idol's reconstitution → `ٱلْيَمِّ` contributes finality of directed disposal alongside its primary water sense.
records.negative_evidence: `فَٱذْهَبْ` alone would be too broad; retention rests on the explicit emphatic sequence and destination. No ritual-earth, bird, or proper-name cue supports `root_001697/B002`, `B004`, or `B005`; `B003` is primary.

records.primary_reading: The noun names the great water into which Moses' mother is commanded to cast him when she fears for him.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The feared water is embedded in a promise of return and future mission. The following ayat show the enemy household unknowingly becoming the means by which the threatened child is preserved.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. The explicit command and promised outcomes make the sea a selected stage in a purposeful trajectory.
records.activation_trace: `فَأَلْقِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ` gives a commanded destination, while `إِنَّا رَآدُّوهُ إِلَيْكِ وَجَاعِلُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ` states the intended endpoints → these cues activate `root_001697/B001` → casting into danger is abductively the directed means of return and commissioning → `ٱلْيَمِّ` reads as a purposeful route under promise in addition to a body of water.
records.negative_evidence: The homonymous bridge is supported by overt direction and outcome, but nothing supports ritual `root_001697/B002`, bird `B004`, or proper-name `B005`; `root_001697/B003` remains the primary water branch.

records.primary_reading: The **يَمّ** is the great body of water into which Pharaoh and his forces are seized and cast; it supplies the concrete place and instrument of their destruction.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window reverses Pharaoh's attempted ascent and self-exaltation: after ordering a tower so that he might look **إِلَىٰ** Moses's God and assuming no return **إِلَيْنَا**, he is forcibly sent downward into the sea. The following **يَدْعُونَ إِلَى ٱلنَّارِ** extends that reversal from a physical end to the destination toward which his leadership points.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. It makes the **يَمّ** not merely the water in which they happen to perish but the deliberately assigned endpoint of the counter-action against them.
records.activation_trace: Trigger: the directed construction **فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ ... فَنَبَذْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ**, reinforced by the window's repeated orientations **أَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰ**, **إِلَيْنَا لَا يُرْجَعُونَ**, and **يَدْعُونَ إِلَى**. Role: B001 contributes intentional targeting. Bridge: the sequence contrasts Pharaoh's chosen aim with the destination chosen for him. Concrete change: **يَمّ** reads as a judicially aimed terminus as well as great water.
records.negative_evidence: The nearby **ٱلطِّينِ** alone does not activate `root_001697/B002`: no clean earth, prayer, face, or hand-wiping construction appears. Nothing locally cues the bird branch `B004` or the proper-name/place branch `B005`.

records.primary_reading: The **يَمّ** is the great water into which Pharaoh and his army are cast while he is blameworthy.
records.ayah_level_surprise: A compact sending-and-rejection sequence frames the drowning: Moses is **أَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ**, Pharaoh turns away, and Pharaoh with his forces is then seized and cast away. The next example replaces destructive water with a barren wind that leaves everything like decay, making different created media execute parallel judgments.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001697/B001` (deliberately aiming toward a target) is retained. It adds to the sea the force of an appointed destination: Pharaoh's rejection of the messenger's directed mission ends in his own directed casting.
records.activation_trace: Trigger: **أَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ** followed by **فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ ... فَنَبَذْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ**. Role: B001 marks deliberate orientation toward an endpoint. Bridge: the matched sequence of sending toward Pharaoh and casting Pharaoh into the sea makes destination structurally conspicuous. Concrete change: **يَمّ** becomes the selected terminus of judgment, not merely its physical setting.
records.negative_evidence: No clean earth or ritual act supports `root_001697/B002`; no bird image supports `B004`; no proper name or relevant place-name supports `B005`.

records.primary_reading: **مَوْجٍ** denotes the immense, turbulent waves through which the vessel carries its passengers, their scale rendered by **كَٱلْجِبَالِ**.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The mountain-like wave exposes the son's proposed mountain refuge as no refuge at all. It also moves from surrounding turbulence to a precise separating agent: **وَحَالَ بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْمَوْجُ**, turning a vast environmental force into the barrier between father and son.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The visible cues **تَجْرِى**, **كَٱلْجِبَالِ**, **حَالَ بَيْنَهُمَا**, and **مِنَ ٱلْمُغْرَقِينَ** intensify the ordinary wave image already covered by `root_001455/B001`; they do not activate another branch.
records.negative_evidence: The inventory contains only `root_001455/B001`, which supplies the primary sense and its extensions to turbulence; there is no distinct accepted branch to retain secondarily.

records.primary_reading: **يَمُوجُ فِى بَعْضٍ** depicts people surging into and intermingling with one another like turbulent waves.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding barrier cannot be climbed or pierced, then is promised to be leveled; immediately the formerly bounded populations become an unbounded human surge. The motion is then arrested by **فَجَمَعْنَٰهُمْ جَمْعًا**, so uncontrolled mutual mixing gives way to a total, divinely effected gathering.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: **بَعْضَهُمْ ... فِى بَعْضٍ** visibly realizes the intermingling component of `root_001455/B001`, while the contrast with **فَجَمَعْنَٰهُمْ جَمْعًا** sharpens its disorder. Both remain within the target's primary accepted branch.
records.negative_evidence: The inventory supplies only `root_001455/B001`; no separate branch exists for a secondary assignment.

records.primary_reading: **مَوْجٌ** is an overwhelming sea wave covering the voyagers like canopies and provoking sincere invocation.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The wave's physical instability uncovers instability in the people: under its cover they call with exclusive devotion, but after deliverance to land some retreat to a merely measured stance and others deny. The preceding calm sailing **بِنِعْمَتِ ٱللَّهِ** and the following warning against deception make the wave a moment of disclosure rather than only danger.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: **غَشِيَهُم**, **كَٱلظُّلَلِ**, and the sea-to-land sequence intensify the surging-water image of `root_001455/B001`; the oscillation in devotion is an ayah-level analogy, not evidence for another water-root branch.
records.negative_evidence: The inventory contains only `root_001455/B001`. No additional accepted branch is available for secondary resonance.

records.primary_reading: **يُغَاثُ ٱلنَّاسُ** announces that the people will be relieved after the seven severe years; the passive form makes received deliverance the clause's ordinary contribution.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Relief is not abstract or momentary. The window moves from sustained sowing, harvesting, and guarded grain through years that consume stored provision, then to a year in which people again press produce. The single year reverses the agency of the devouring years and restores productive human action.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001118/B001` (life-giving rain) and `root_001118/B002` (rain-grown vegetation) are retained. B001 locates the relief in renewed precipitation; B002 makes it relief embodied in restored crops and their yield.
records.activation_trace: For B001, trigger: the agricultural drought/recovery sequence **تَزْرَعُونَ ... سَبْعٌ شِدَادٌ ... عَامٌ فِيهِ يُغَاثُ**. Role: rain is the enabling medium. Bridge: after years that consume stored harvests, renewed agricultural activity requires restored water. Concrete change: **يُغَاثُ** becomes meteorologically concrete relief. For B002, trigger: **سُنۢبُلِهِ**, **حَصَدتُّمْ**, and especially the resumed **يَعْصِرُونَ**. Role: vegetation is the visible product of relief. Bridge: pressing presupposes renewed produce after scarcity. Concrete change: the verb includes recovery of fruitfulness, not only escape from distress.
records.negative_evidence: No cloud is named or imaged strongly enough for `root_001118/B003`. No horse or racing sequence supports the single-source `B005`.

records.primary_reading: **ٱلْغَيْثَ** is the rain that God sends down, placed among matters of divine knowledge and action inaccessible to ordinary human foresight.
records.ayah_level_surprise: Rain is framed between the unknown Hour and what is hidden in wombs, future earning, and the land of one's death. It therefore contributes not only water but a concrete instance of life-shaping futurity that humans cannot master.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001118/B004` (relief of one in distress) is retained. It lets the rain carry the remembered force of deliverance, not precipitation alone.
records.activation_trace: Trigger: two ayat earlier, those covered by a wave **دَعَوُا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ** and **نَجَّىٰهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْبَرِّ**. Role: B004 supplies distress followed by divine rescue. Bridge: the same local window moves from desperate invocation and deliverance to God sending **غيث**, another event beyond human control. Concrete change: the rain reads as divinely administered succor within the sequence of unknowable outcomes.
records.negative_evidence: No vegetation cue supports `root_001118/B002`, and no cloud is visible for `B003`. **تَكْسِبُ غَدًا** is not horse-running and does not meet the high burden for the single-source `B005`.

records.primary_reading: **ٱلْغَيْثَ** is rain sent down after people have despaired, renewing the land and their prospects.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah says provision is not simply spread without limit but sent down **بِقَدَرٍ مَّا يَشَآءُ**; the rain then arrives after despair and is paired with the spreading of mercy. Thus its delay and measure, not only its abundance, belong to its beneficent function.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001118/B004` (relief of one in distress) is retained. It changes **غيث** from merely awaited precipitation into the enacted release of people whose hope has failed.
records.activation_trace: Trigger: the explicit sequence **مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا قَنَطُوا۟ وَيَنشُرُ رَحْمَتَهُۥ**, supported by **وَهُوَ ٱلْوَلِىُّ**. Role: B004 supplies rescue and release from distress. Bridge: despair names the distressed state, and the coordinated spreading of mercy names its reversal. Concrete change: the target rain becomes personal and providential relief as well as water.
records.negative_evidence: No plant or herbage appears for `root_001118/B002`; descent alone does not establish the cloud-naming branch `B003`; no horse or successive running supports the single-source `B005`.

records.primary_reading: **غَيْثٍ** is rain in the simile of worldly life: it produces growth that delights its observers before yellowing and becoming debris.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The rain image does not end at life-giving growth; the repeated **ثُمَّ** forces attention through attraction, ripening or agitation, discoloration, and collapse. The next command **سَابِقُوٓا۟** redirects the competitive energy named by **تَفَاخُرٌ** and **تَكَاثُرٌ** away from transient increase toward forgiveness and the garden.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001118/B002` (rain-grown vegetation) and `root_001118/B005` (successive horse-running) are retained. B002 shifts **غيث** metonymically from falling rain toward the growth whose whole lifecycle the simile tracks. B005 adds an unusually rapid, successive-running cadence to that lifecycle and sharpens the following redirection of human racing.
records.activation_trace: For B002, trigger: the immediate possessive **نَبَاتُهُۥ**, followed by **يَهِيجُ**, **مُصْفَرًّا**, and **حُطَٰمًا**. Role: the rain-named vegetation becomes the image's visible subject. Bridge: the text explicitly moves from rain to its growth and then follows that growth. Concrete change: **غيث** bears the entire produced lifecycle, not just its initiating shower. For the higher-burden B005, trigger: the repeated succession **ثُمَّ ... ثُمَّ** followed immediately by **سَابِقُوٓا۟**. Role: B005 contributes one run following another. Bridge: sequential stages race to collapse, then the audience is told to race in another direction. Concrete change: **غيث** acquires a compressed forward momentum that exposes worldly flourishing as short-lived and redirects striving.
records.negative_evidence: No cloud appears for `root_001118/B003`. The mention of forgiveness does not itself show a distressed person's plea or rescue, so `B004` is not retained.

records.primary_reading: **أُجَاجًا** describes the drinking water as intensely salty and bitter, hence a withheld drinkable blessing were God to make it so.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window places potable water and kindled fire in parallel questions of human versus divine production. The threatened transformation of drink into harshness prepares for the adjacent fire, while **فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ** identifies ordinary drinkability itself as the overlooked gift.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000014/B002` (blazing, glowing, and intense heat) is retained. It adds a fire-like register of severity to the bitter salinity and binds the water warning to the immediately following fire scene.
records.activation_trace: Trigger: **أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ** directly after **أُجَاجًا**. Role: B002 supplies blazing and kindled heat. Bridge: the two adjacent **أَفَرَءَيْتُم** units juxtapose altered drinking water with fire humans kindle, and the root inventory itself recognizes heat as a distinct accepted branch. Concrete change: **أجاج** conveys not only undrinkable salt-bitterness but an almost burning harshness within a paired water/fire test of dependence.
records.negative_evidence: No audible rustling, crowd speech, running, or walking supports `root_000014/B001`. Mere intensity inherent in salinity does not meet the high burden for the single-source generalized maximum branch `B004`.

records.primary_reading: The noun denotes the destructive torrent sent against the people after their turning away, the event that effects the loss of their former gardens.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window moves from two flourishing gardens on the right and left (34:15) to two gardens of altered, scant produce, and then names this reversal recompense (34:17). The torrent therefore exposes the contingency of an apparently secure, spatially ordered prosperity.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_000770/B004` is retained as an arboreal afterimage; it supplements rather than replaces the flowing-torrent sense.
records.activation_trace: The immediate continuation `جَنَّتَيْنِ ذَوَاتَىْ أُكُلٍ خَمْطٍ وَأَثْلٍ وَشَىْءٍ مِّن سِدْرٍ قَلِيلٍ` visibly inventories trees and woody produce, activating B004's *sayal*-tree branch. Because the torrent is the agent in the same sentence's exchange of one pair of gardens for another, the branch bridges the flowing cause to the arboreal condition left in its wake. `سَيْلَ` thus contributes not only inundation but a transition into a diminished tree-world.
records.negative_evidence: The spreading villages and travel of 34:18 do not depict extension *like a flow* closely enough for B002. The right/left gardens are not a man's beard-sides or flanks, so B005 is not retained. No iron tang or specifically *sayal*-named tree activates B003 beyond its high burden or strengthens B004 into literal tree identification; B004 remains only resonance.

records.primary_reading: The word is a heavy downpour that washes the thin soil from smooth rock and leaves it bare, imaging the nullification of ostentatious charity.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The very same heavy rain makes the sincere garden yield doubly in 2:265. The window therefore makes the downpour diagnostic rather than intrinsically destructive: its result discloses what lies beneath the visible covering.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001619/B002` is retained. Its role is the harmful weight and consequence enacted through the literal rain.
records.activation_trace: The commands and results `لَا تُبْطِلُوا۟`, `بِٱلْمَنِّ وَٱلْأَذَىٰ`, `فَتَرَكَهُۥ صَلْدًا`, and `لَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ مِّمَّا كَسَبُوا۟` visibly supply injury, nullification, and a feared outcome, activating B002's severity/harmful-consequence branch. The abductive bridge is that the physical weight of the downpour realizes the moral *وبال* of display and injury. `وَابِلٌ` consequently measures the crushing consequence of the act, not merely rainfall intensity.
records.negative_evidence: The bare rock's failure to retain soil is not bodily unwholesomeness or unpalatability, so B003 is not retained here. No thick implement, bundle, or animal-mating cue supports B004 or the single-source B006.

records.primary_reading: The first occurrence is the heavy rain that strikes a well-sited garden and leads it to give twice its produce, imaging sincere expenditure made from inward firmness.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding rock is stripped by a downpour, whereas this garden is multiplied by one; the following ruined garden (2:266) shows that abundance itself can remain vulnerable. The beneficial result rests on grounded receptivity, not on the force being mild.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001619/B002` and `root_001619/B003` are retained. B002 supplies contrastive weight or ordeal; B003 supplies a qualitative, assimilability counterimage.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001619/B002`, the preceding `وَابِلٌ فَتَرَكَهُۥ صَلْدًا` and the following `إِعْصَارٌ فِيهِ نَارٌ فَٱحْتَرَقَتْ` visibly display heavy impacts with harmful outcomes. The same force instead elicits doubled fruit here, so its role is a weighty test whose result reveals the garden's grounding; `وَابِلٌ` contributes proof of firmness, not merely irrigation. For `root_001619/B003`, the direct result `أُكُلَهَا` and the 2:267 opposition `مِن طَيِّبَاتِ مَا كَسَبْتُمْ` / `ٱلْخَبِيثَ ... وَلَسْتُم بِـَٔاخِذِيهِ` activate the branch's food and acceptability domain. Set against B003's unwholesomeness, the garden's assimilated rain and doubled food make the target mark an input transformed into acceptable, wholesome yield.
records.negative_evidence: No carried club, beating implement, bundle, or animal-state expression activates B004 or the single-source B006.

records.primary_reading: The second occurrence repeats heavy rain inside a negated condition: even if such rain does not reach the garden, lighter moisture suffices.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The conditional reduces dependence on spectacular intensity. In the window's comparison of stripped rock, fruitful garden, and burned garden, enduring fruitfulness is presented as a property of the recipient rather than a guarantee supplied by dramatic weather.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001619/B002` is retained as a negated threshold of weight and severity.
records.activation_trace: The visible contrast `فَإِن لَّمْ يُصِبْهَا وَابِلٌ فَطَلٌّ` places the second target against the lighter `طَلٌّ`, while 2:264 has just shown a `وَابِلٌ` producing the harmful result `فَتَرَكَهُۥ صَلْدًا`. These cues activate `root_001619/B002`: the heavy incidence functions as the strong test that may be absent. The bridge is contrastive, not a claim that this rain harms the garden; `وَابِلٌ` adds that sincere fertility does not require the severest pressure to become effective.
records.negative_evidence: The food-quality cues attach directly to the first rain's produced `أُكُلَهَا`; they do not independently localize B003 in this negated second token. B004 and B006 lack concrete implement, bundle, or animal triggers.

records.primary_reading: The word denotes descending rain seen emerging through the accumulated cloud.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The window passes from universal worship and divine ownership to a staged cloud process, threatened sight, alternation of night and day, and creatures made from water. Rain is thus one visible movement inside a larger order of perception, life, and return.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001636/B001` and `root_001636/B004` are retained. B001 supplies directed coming; B004 supplies an eye-centered danger at the event's edge.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001636/B001`, `وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ` is followed by the ordered motion `يُزْجِى ... يُؤَلِّفُ ... يَجْعَلُهُۥ ... يَخْرُجُ`, visibly activating coming, approach, and arrival. The branch's role is kinetic: the `وَدْقَ` is not static material but an arrival brought through a sequence to its recipients. For anomalous `root_001636/B004`, the unusually exact trigger `يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرْقِهِۦ يَذْهَبُ بِٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ`, reinforced by `لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ` in 24:44, meets the higher burden of the eye-disease branch. Its role is a perceptual counterimage: the rain-bearing display that invites seeing also nearly removes sight, so `وَدْقَ` carries a locally dangerous visual edge alongside nourishment.
records.negative_evidence: The animals made from water in 24:45 do not display mating desire, and walking on the belly is not navel flow; B002 and the single-source B009 fail. Hail and lightning do not supply the fixed severe-calamity idiom, a heat scene, a battle-ground, or a sharp sword, so B005-B008 are not retained.

records.primary_reading: The word is rain emerging through pieces of cloud and reaching chosen servants, at which they rejoice.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The preceding ayah sends messengers with clear signs, and the following ayat call rain an effect of mercy that revives dead earth and points to resurrection. The weather sequence therefore functions as a delivered sign as well as relief.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001636/B001` is retained. It gives the rain the role of an arriving, directed bearer.
records.activation_trace: The local sequence `أَرْسَلْنَا ... رُسُلًا ... فَجَآءُوهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ` (30:47) is answered by `يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ` and `أَصَابَ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ` (30:48). Sending, coming, and reaching visibly activate `root_001636/B001`, whose scope is approach and arrival. The abductive bridge is the parallel sent-and-arriving sequence: `وَدْقَ` contributes an arrival carrying mercy and a sign, not precipitation alone.
records.negative_evidence: `فَتَرَى` and `فَٱنظُرْ` concern seeing, not eye disease, so B004 does not pass. Vengeance in 30:47 lacks the fixed B005 expression; no mating, heat, battle-ground, sharp implement, or navel-flow cue supports B002 or B005-B009.

records.primary_reading: The word names the caravan's water-arriver or water-drawer, sent ahead to reach the well and obtain water.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The expected water task retrieves a boy, who is immediately concealed as merchandise and then sold before being received into a household. Ordinary arrival at a resource becomes the hinge of a person's passage between radically different statuses.
records.water_root_resonance: `root_001640/B006` and `root_001640/B007` are retained. B006 supplies the downward reaching action; B007 supplies advance entry on behalf of the group.
records.activation_trace: For `root_001640/B006`, `فَأَدْلَىٰ دَلْوَهُۥ` is an exact visible image of something lengthened or let down until it reaches its destination. The branch makes the target's arrival recursive: the water-arriver reaches the well by making the bucket reach downward, and that reaching unexpectedly contacts the boy. For `root_001640/B007`, `جَآءَتْ سَيَّارَةٌ فَأَرْسَلُوا۟ وَارِدَهُمْ` shows the group arriving and dispatching one member ahead, directly activating advance and entry before others. The target thus contributes not only an occupational label but the vanguard action that opens the narrative's next sequence.
records.negative_evidence: `بِضَٰعَةً` and `دَرَٰهِمَ مَعْدُودَةٍ` concern merchandise and price, not a recurring allotted portion, so B002 is not retained. The previous `دَمٍ كَذِبٍ` does not explicitly state rose-red color or a vein, and there is no fever cue; B003-B005 fail.

records.primary_reading: The noun is a physical well left unused amid the remains of a destroyed wrongdoing settlement.
records.ayah_level_surprise: The disabled well and raised palace are paired after the collapsed dwellings: low life-sustaining infrastructure and high monumental construction alike remain as unusable evidence. The following appeal to traveling hearts and ears turns the abandoned landscape into material for perception.
records.water_root_resonance: No secondary water-root branch retained.
records.activation_trace: The physical pit image belongs to the target's primary `root_000078/B001` branch. Although `أَخَذْتُهُمْ`, `أَهْلَكْنَٰهَا`, and the coming `ٱلْعَذَابِ` create a setting of calamity, no local speech, slander, or agent who causes another to fall into trouble supplies the mechanism required for `root_000078/B003`.
records.negative_evidence: Nothing is hidden, stored, or described as a reserve, so `root_000078/B002` does not pass. General destruction alone is insufficient to activate B003's specific figurative informer or slanderer.
